items.text:
🕌✨ 𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗜𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦 𝗔𝗥𝗘 𝗛𝗘𝗥𝗘 — 𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗗𝗗𝗜𝗡 𝗣𝗔𝗡𝗧𝗢 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟲 ✨🕌
Get ready for a magical adventure full of laughter, music, dance, comedy and BIG pantomime energy as TPA brings 𝗔𝗟𝗔𝗗𝗗𝗜𝗡 to the stage! 🌟🎭

Our exciting 2-week audition workshop is the perfect chance for young performers to build confidence, make friends and experience the fun of a full-scale theatre production - no panto experience needed!

⭐ Learn songs & choreography
⭐ Explore characters & script work
⭐ Audition for featured & principal roles
⭐ Be part of an unforgettable production experience

📍 Rutherglen Guide Hall
📅 Audition Workshops: 7th & 14th June
✅ Book here: https://the-performance-academy.classforkids.io/camp/287

🎭 Rehearsals Begin: 21st June
✨ Show Dates: 1st–3rd November 2026
📍 East Kilbride Village Theatre

Whether your child loves acting, singing, dancing or simply wants to shine on stage, this is one they won’t want to miss! 🌟

items.text:
“Bo” CASTING CALL – Proof of Concept Short Film (Austin, TX)
We are seeking a young Asian actress (ages 8–10) and a medium-sized dog for a proof-of-concept shoot for Bo, an upcoming short film currently in development.

My name is Rachel Villagomez, director of Bo, and I will be collaborating with cinematographer Carlos Roberto Nevarez to film a scene from the script as part of the project’s development process.

Logline:

A quiet young girl must find her voice and inner strength to save her beloved dog while adjusting to life on her estranged father’s rural Texas farm, thousands of miles away from the home she left behind.

ROLE: ANIKA

* Female, ages 8–10

* Asian or mixed Asian heritage

* Quiet, thoughtful, and adventurous

* Bilingual (Optional but heavily recommended)

Actors who can speak Thai, Lao, Mandarin, Japanese, or Korean (or another Asian language that reflects their background) are heavily encouraged to apply. Ideally, we would love commit to an actress who may also be interested in participating in a future production of the full short film.

Shoot Dates

June 20–21, 2026

Bear Creek area, Austin, Texas

Compensation

This is a low-budget proof-of-concept production. While funding is limited, meals will be provided and participants will receive footage for their reels/portfolios. Bonus-eligible upon grant reception. 

This is a great opportunity for non actors/beginner actors who want to break into screen acting. 

To submit, please email rmvillagomez3@gmail.com 

headshots/photos, any relevant experience, and availability.

items.text:
ISO BG actors for 2h on 5/31

Hello, I’m looking for background actors for my short film You’re Not Well. We are shooting in Brooklyn (Bedstuy) this weekend and I need BG actors to play a live audience from a podcast and laugh at our main character. We will get close up shots of your reactions!

We will need you for 2h around from around 3-m to 5 pm.

This is a passion project so unfortunately it is unpaid but we will of course get that footage to you for your reel.

If interested you can email me at nievesgarciaperchin@gmail.com

Thank you!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — LEAD ROLE**

We are casting **LOGAN**, the lead role in the independent feature film **AFTERGLOW**.

**Shoot Dates:** August 13–23
**Filming Days:** Approx. 5–6 days
**Location:** Los Angeles, CA
**Pay:** Deferred pay with contract
**Includes:** IMDb credit, meals, footage

—

**Working Title:** *Afterglow*
**Genre:** Thriller / Drama

**Logline:**
After a party ends in a girl’s disappearance, a closeted teen is torn between the boy he never got over and the girl who helped him set the night in motion.

—

**ROLE: LOGAN — Lead**
**Age Range:** 18–25 to play 18
**Race/Ethnicity:** Open
**Height:** 5’10”–6’2” preferred
**Body Type:** Lean / athletic preferred

Logan is seen as the natural leader of his friend group: magnetic, eccentric, likable, and effortlessly charming without trying. He makes friends easily and draws people in, but beneath that charm, he is quietly unraveling.

Secretly struggling with his sexuality in an environment where vulnerability feels dangerous, Logan is caught between desire, repression, guilt, and the pressure of becoming an adult. He is emotionally guarded, impulsive, reactive, and occasionally self-destructive.

**Seeking LGBTQ+ actors strongly preferred.**

**Important Notes:**
This role requires strong emotional range, vulnerability, and intense chemistry with the actor playing Jason. Chemistry with Jason is essential to the story.

This role **includes intimacy**. All intimacy will be handled professionally, with clear communication, boundaries, and appropriate production protocols.

—

**To Submit:**
Please send your headshot, resume, reel, and availability to:

**[info@afterglowthefilm.com](mailto:info@afterglowthefilm.com)**

topComments.text: I would’ve loved this role but I’m older than what your looking for

Next session kicks off Thursday, 7/16! 🎭 Don't miss out: https://www.keepitrealacting.com/classes/#tv-and-film-audition-intensive

items.text:
**KEY GRIP + GRIP TRUCK NEEDED — SHORT FILM (JUNE 18–20)** 

Hey gang! We’re currently looking for an experienced **Key Grip with a Grip Truck** for an upcoming **short film production** shooting **June 18th–20th**.

This project is **SHALOM SALAM: A RECIPE FOR PEACE** — a powerful and uplifting film about connection, humanity, and bridging divides through culture and community.

I’m incredibly proud to be part of this project alongside award-winning filmmakers **Bayou Bennett** and **Daniel Lir** of Dream Team Directors — a directing duo with **80+ international film awards** and over **16 years** of creating visually stunning, emotionally impactful films centered around humanity and connection.

 **Shalom Salam** tells the story of an Israeli and Palestinian entrepreneur who come together through food, technology, and community to inspire peace in a divided world.

 **Project Info:**
https://seedandspark.com/fund/shalom-salam-a-recipe-for-peace#story

**PROJECT DETAILS**
**Position:** Key Grip + Grip Truck
**Shoot Dates:** **June 18–20**
**Project Type:** Short Film
**Rate:** **$800–$900 Per Day** (depending on package/availability)
**Location:** Washington State
**Status:** Non-Union 

We’re looking for someone dependable, collaborative, and comfortable working on an indie narrative set. Grip truck package details and previous work/reel are appreciated when reaching out.

If interested, please send:
• Your experience/resume
• Grip truck package details
• Availability for the shoot dates
• Contact info

 **Contact:**
Henry Galliett
henrygalliett@gmail.com
425-623-5677

Please share with anyone who may be a good fit!

items.summary:
**KEY GRIP + GRIP TRUCK NEEDED — SHORT FILM (JUNE 18–20)** 

Hey gang! We’re currently looking for an experienced **Key Grip with a Grip Truck** for an upcoming **short film production** shooting **June 18th–20th**.

This project is **SHALOM SALAM: A RECIPE FOR PEACE** — a powerful and uplifting film about connection, humanity, and bridging divides through culture and community.

I’m incredibly proud to be part of this project alongside award-winning filmmakers **Bayou Bennett** and **Daniel Lir** of Dream Team Directors — a directing duo with **80+ international film awards** and over **16 years** of creating visually stunning, emotionally impactful films centered around humanity and connection.

 **Shalom Salam** tells the story of an Israeli and Palestinian entrepreneur who come together through food, technology, and community to inspire peace in a divided world.

 **Project Info:**
https://seedandspark.com/fund/shalom-salam-a-recipe-for-peace#story

**PROJECT DETAILS**
**Position:** Key Grip + Grip Truck
**Shoot Dates:** **June 18–20**
**Project Type:** Short Film
**Rate:** **$800–$900 Per Day** (depending on package/availability)
**Location:** Washington State
**Status:** Non-Union 

We’re looking for someone dependable, collaborative, and comfortable working on an indie narrative set. Grip truck package details and previous work/reel are appreciated when reaching out.

If interested, please send:
• Your experience/resume
• Grip truck package details
• Availability for the shoot dates
• Contact info

 **Contact:**
Henry Galliett
henrygalliett@gmail.com
425-623-5677

Please share with anyone who may be a good fit!

items.text:
Looking for a filming location around Los Angeles for upcoming NYFA MFA Producing short film projects.

Does anyone have access to either:

• A therapist office that could be used for a one-day shoot

OR preferably

• A house with a home office that could double as a therapist office, along with a living room, kitchen, bedroom, and some type of patio/backyard area.

Ideally looking for a location available for 3 filming days in a row so I can shoot multiple projects the same week:
• Bad at Love
• Love Bots
• Love

(Yes, there is definitely a theme there.)

I should have pitch packet materials available soon, but finding the location first is important so I know which project to focus on for my class production. Only one film is for class, but I am trying to complete multiple projects around the same timeframe. If everything can be filmed together, my school will be able to cover the location insurance.

Please message me if you know of a possible location or someone who might be interested. Thank you!

- LuvLeighAn Clark

items.text:
Alright!

**deep exhale**

Here we go!

My very first "Cold Read".

In the arts, a cold read is a scene in which an actor performs with no sides (script) and little to no prep.

The goal is as an actor is to stay present and believable in the scene absent these variables.

This scene in particular was an original monolugue I wrote for myself.

We follow Dutch. 

The head of a criminal enterprise who confronts one of his trusted subordinates for colluding with his competion.

I wanted to try my hand at doing the scene in a british accent to challenge myself in being more fluid with the dialogue.

Also,

The knife is not just for the purpose of intimidation in the scene.

As an actor, I'm being educated on the importance of CHOICES, DOINGS, and PROPS that are essential to the scene and character objective. 

The knife is a prop that allows me to stay connected even though I don't have a script and little context of the scene entirely. 

You'll notice I STOP and pause to glance at the knife as it brought me safety in the scene when I felt lost and it allowed me to stay present.

Stay tuned for more art.

Ase.

items.text:
I'm seeking an actress for a role in a short film 🎥 in Macomb, Illinois. I can pay $300 for about two hours of rehearsing, about two hours of filming and multiple hours on your own time of studying the script and memorizing your lines. The  actress I need for the role is a female between 18-25, willing to wear a colorful wig and bright-colored make-up and willing to act in a provocative role. Please! Only serious inquiries for the role. I work fast and efficiently, obsessively and compulsively and I'm kind, patient and easy to talk to and work with, but I am a perfectionist so I demand the best work I can possibly create and produce, and that's what I expect from anyone that works with me on a film. I'm currently writing the script for this short film that will have a running-time of around five minutes, so I will be ready to film in about a month.
    I have two short films completed and this is the link to one of my Short Films that is on my YouTube page.

- Konrad Sołtysik (45) – stalker Anny, zleceniodawca pobicia. Średnia budowa ciała, kuleje. Ubrany w stylu „tania elegancja”. Skryty, obsesyjny, przekonany, że Anna potrzebuje jego ochrony. 
3 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Tomasz Drzewosz   (38) – ofiara pobicia, mąż Anny. Sprawny fizycznie mężczyzna, trochę zaniedbany, z zarostem, brzuszkiem piwnym. Nadużywa alkoholu, sprawca przemocy domowej. 1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ netto

- Mateusz Malik (36) – sprawca pobicia, działał na zlecenie, pracuje jako dostawca jedzenia. Sprawny fizycznie, silny, tzw. „byczek”. Ma za sobą wyrok za rozbój. Małomówny.  1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Sąsiad Grzegorz Siwiec  (42) – sąsiad z bloku Tomasza i Anny, skonfliktowany z Tomaszem o miejsce parkingowe. Tęgi, głośny, szybko się irytuje, ubiera się w dresy. 2 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Radek Radosław Blajer (35) – diler, niższy, grubszy, w szarej bluzie i jeansach.  1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

**WARSZAWA**

** **

**film fabularny – GŁÓWNA ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

 

Do filmu fabularnego poszukuję **CHŁOPCA 9-12 lat **uzdolnionego wokalnie (najchętniej śpiew ludowy, choć niekoniecznie).

Zdjęcia planowane na rok 2027, w tej chwili rozpoczynamy castingi.

** **

 

Do zgłoszenia proszę załączyć wizytówkę jako link do You Tube, krótki opis doświadczenia przed kamerą oraz nagranie śpiewu chłopca (również jako link do You Tube).

Proszę nie podawać doświadczenia w reklamach ani statystowania.

*** ***

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: **ewelina.wika@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule: **WBG**

W treści: **imię i nazwisko dziecka i rodzica, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość, wzrost**

CASTING CALL — WICKED FRIDAYS 

NOC Theatre is seeking Black performers for the theatre production, Wicked Fridays, a dark psychological thriller exploring isolation, desire, survival, and the stories we tell ourselves to endure.

We're currently casting:

LEILANI (Female, 25–30) — British-Caribbean
ARIEL (Male, 18–22) — Caribbean accent required

 London
 Paid
 Auditions: 22–24 June
 Rehearsals: August
 Performances: October

To apply, send your:
• Headshot
• CV
• Spotlight Link (if applicable)

Email: noctheatrecompany@gmail.com

If you're drawn to psychologically intense storytelling, layered characters, and atmospheric theatre, we'd love to hear from you.

#CastingCall #BlackActors #BlackPerformers #TheatreCasting #LondonTheatre #ActorsUK #BritishTheatre #CaribbeanActors #StageActors #Auditions #PaidActingJob #WickedFridays

items.text:
EVC TALENT CASTING SHOW 2026 – JURYCASTING LIVE
Die Suche nach den außergewöhnlichsten Talenten beginnt.

Für die EVC Talent Casting Show 2026 suchen wir Künstlerinnen und Künstler aus ganz Deutschland sowie den europäischen Nachbarländern, die mit Talent, Leidenschaft und Ausstrahlung überzeugen.

Am Samstag, den 20. Juni 2026, findet im XOX-Theater Kleve das offizielle Jurycasting statt. Bewerben können sich Solokünstler, Duos und Gruppen aller Altersklassen und Genres. 

Das Theater befindet sich in der Briener Straße 6–14, 47533 Kleve.  

Gesucht werden Talente aus den Bereichen:

• Musik

• Tanz

• Akrobatik

• Comedy

• Artistik

• Entertainment

• Showacts

• und viele weitere kreative Darbietungen

Jurycasting Live

20. Juni 2026 | 12:00 – 17:00 Uhr

XOX-Theater Kleve

Briener Straße 6–14

47533 Kleve in Nordrhein Westfalen 

Interessierte Talente können sich vorab online anmelden oder am Veranstaltungstag ohne vorherige Bewerbung direkt vor Ort vorsprechen.

Online-Bewerbung:

www.electricvisionscleve.de/casting.html

Nutzen Sie die Gelegenheit, Ihr Talent auf einer professionellen Bühne zu präsentieren und Teil einer einzigartigen Showproduktion zu werden.

Egal ob aus Deutschland, den Niederlanden, Belgien oder anderen Nachbarländern wir freuen uns auf außergewöhnliche Talente, die bereit sind, die Bühne zu erobern!

items.text:
Places & People: Burcu and Turkish Hospitality 1 - KarrideoTV https://youtu.be/rSky6aV76DM 

Burcu in Faralya is the beginning of a special KarrideoTV travel series about hospitality, nature, craftsmanship and the story behind the Soap Lady. 

In this first part of Places & People, I, Christian Weiße, meet host Burcu on her property in Faralya. Many people know Burcu as the Soap Lady, but behind this name there is much more than just a beautiful travel image. 

This video is not a classic hotel tour and not a superficial travel recommendation. It is a calm travel dialogue about a special place, a special woman and a world created from nature, family, soap craftsmanship, art and genuine hospitality. 

Faralya is located above Ölüdeniz and combines Mediterranean landscapes, peace, views and proximity to the Lycian Way. This is exactly where the atmosphere is created that Burcu’s guests describe again and again: personal, warm, slow-paced and full of details. 

In Part 1, the first glimpse opens onto Burcu, her energy and the place where Soap Lady Cottage, Daisy Suite and Lion Suite become a small Mediterranean world of experience. 

This video is part of the KarrideoTV playlist “TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure”. 

Subscribe, like, share and comment to follow the full series. 

Which encounter while traveling has ever shown you that a place becomes truly special because of the person behind it? 

Links and resources: 

Soap Lady & More: https://soapladyoludeniz.com/ 

KarrideoTV Playlist: TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure | KarrideoTV 

🎙️ KARRIDEO TV - Mindset • Business • Stories 

KarrideoTV is your German-language magazine for personal development, business, society and true stories. We bring you journalistic reports, interviews, expert knowledge, documentaries and mindset impulses - for people who want to make more of their lives. 

📌 Topics on this channel:

items.summary:
Places & People: Burcu and Turkish Hospitality 1 - KarrideoTV https://youtu.be/rSky6aV76DM 

Burcu in Faralya is the beginning of a special KarrideoTV travel series about hospitality, nature, craftsmanship and the story behind the Soap Lady. 

In this first part of Places & People, I, Christian Weiße, meet host Burcu on her property in Faralya. Many people know Burcu as the Soap Lady, but behind this name there is much more than just a beautiful travel image. 

This video is not a classic hotel tour and not a superficial travel recommendation. It is a calm travel dialogue about a special place, a special woman and a world created from nature, family, soap craftsmanship, art and genuine hospitality. 

Faralya is located above Ölüdeniz and combines Mediterranean landscapes, peace, views and proximity to the Lycian Way. This is exactly where the atmosphere is created that Burcu’s guests describe again and again: personal, warm, slow-paced and full of details. 

In Part 1, the first glimpse opens onto Burcu, her energy and the place where Soap Lady Cottage, Daisy Suite and Lion Suite become a small Mediterranean world of experience. 

This video is part of the KarrideoTV playlist “TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure”. 

Subscribe, like, share and comment to follow the full series. 

Which encounter while traveling has ever shown you that a place becomes truly special because of the person behind it? 

Links and resources: 

Soap Lady & More: https://soapladyoludeniz.com/ 

KarrideoTV Playlist: TRAVEL - Travel, Tourism & Adventure | KarrideoTV

items.text:
Khalif Walter Malone im Interview im Neuen Kölner Filmhaus: Filmton, Blues, Chicago und Köln verbinden sich zu einem Gespräch über Klang, Setarbeit und kreative Wege. 

Dieses Interview entstand direkt beim Netzwerktreffen des Neuen Kölner Filmhauses e.V. im Atelier MyMiniMe in Köln-Ehrenfeld. Sandra Wötzel und Christian Weiße trafen dort Khalif Walter Malone, vielen bekannt als kdub_audioguy und Khalif Wailin’ Walter. Das Gespräch fand im Umfeld der freien Filmszene statt und lief im Beisein des Teams der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion, das als Gast der WhatsApp-Gruppe vor Ort war. 

Im Mittelpunkt steht ein Mann, der Klang nicht nur technisch versteht, sondern künstlerisch lebt. Khalif kommt aus Chicago, lebt heute in Deutschland und arbeitet im Film- und TV-Audiobereich als Boom Operator, Audio Assistant, Sound Mixer und Tonproduzent. Gleichzeitig bringt er als Musiker, Gitarrist, Sänger und Blues-Künstler eine besondere Tiefe in jedes Gespräch über Sound, Rhythmus und Atmosphäre. 

Das Neue Kölner Filmhaus e.V. wurde für dieses Interview zum idealen Ort. Der Verein zur Förderung der freien Filmkultur bringt Filmschaffende, Künstler, Filmstudenten, Quereinsteiger und Filminteressierte zusammen. Hier geht es um Austausch, Filmteams, Projekte, Kino, Festivals, Förderungen und gemeinsames Lernen. 

Dieses Video zeigt, wie aus einem Netzwerkabend ein echtes Interview wird! 

Teile dieses Video mit Menschen, die Film, Musik, Ton, Blues, Köln, kreative Netzwerke oder die Arbeit der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion spannend finden. 

#KhalifWalterMalone #kdub_audioguy #NeuesKölnerFilmhaus #Karrideo #Filmton

items.text:
🎬 Poszukujemy animatora do współpracy przy krótkometrażowym filmie animowanym „Rybna Historia”!

Szukamy osoby, która wesprze główną animatorkę projektu przy animowaniu międzyfaz (in-betweens) w okresie **lipiec–sierpień 2026**.

📌 Wymagania:
• doświadczenie w pracy w **Toon Boom Harmony**
• dobra znajomość zasad animacji
• dyspozycyjność przez najbliższe 2 miesiące

🎓 Forma współpracy:
• **zlecenie płatne – wynagrodzenie 2900 zł za okres współpracy**
lub
• **praktyki studenckie** – dla osób zainteresowanych zdobyciem doświadczenia i zaliczeniem praktyk.

🎥 O projekcie:
„Rybna Historia” to krótkometrażowy film animowany o planowanej długości około **7 minut**, realizowany w ramach projektu dyplomowego w Szkole Filmowej w Łodzi. Film opowiada o tym, jak trudne doświadczenia i negatywne wzorce wyniesione z domu mogą zostać przekształcone w źródło empatii oraz motywację do czynienia dobra. Projekt ma charakter niekomercyjny i jest przygotowywany z myślą o zgłoszeniach na festiwale filmowe.

📩 Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o przesłanie:
• showreel,
• portfolio,
• link do Instagrama 

Bądź czegoś innego prezentującego dotychczasową pracę.

Jeśli chcesz dołączyć do projektu lub znasz kogoś, kto mógłby być zainteresowany, napisz wiadomość skontaktuj się z nami. Chętnie opowiemy więcej o filmie i zakresie współpracy.

🐟🎬     

                                                                                                            Zainteresowanych proszę o kontakt mailowy: [rybnahistoria.kontakt@gmail.com](mailto:rybnahistoria.kontakt@gmail.com)

sharedPost.text:
🐈‍⬛💰Pamiętasz emocje, gdy cała Polska wstrzymywała oddech przy otwieraniu bramek? WRACAMY! Reaktywujemy kultowe show
 „IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ” i szukamy właśnie Ciebie! 📺✨#BawSięiWygrywaj 

Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:
• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡
• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡
• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!
•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:
• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.
• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ (wymagany język polski). Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

🎭 EXTRA: Im bardziej szalony strój, tym lepiej! Przebierz się za dinozaura, policjanta, albo załóż najbardziej kolorowe ciuchy, jakie masz w szafie. Zróbmy show, o którym będzie głośno! 🦖🎨

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?
Nie zwlekaj, miejsca w studio znikają szybciej niż nagrody z bramek!
Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL
Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ
W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

items.text:
SPRAWIEDLIWI WYDZIAŁ KRYMINALNY.

Wrocław.

Na środę 10.06  szukamy dziewczynki i chłopaka z Wrocławia.

🎬ZABŁYŚNIJ NA EKRANIE!🎬
Masz dyplom szkoły aktorskiej - być może właśnie Ciebie szukamy! ❤️‍🔥
Do cyklicznego serialu realizowanego we Wrocławiu poszukujemy aktorek i aktorów po szkołach filmowych oraz teatralnych
Każda rola to główna postać jednego odcinka!

👉Zdjęcia realizowane są w różnych terminach, zgłoś się, porozmawiajmy - znajdziemy odpowiedni termin na zdjęcia właśnie dla Ciebie ☺️
👉Stawka: 3000 zł za 3 dni zdjęciowe
👉Zapewniamy hotel oraz zwrot kosztów dojazdu
👉Nowa ekipa, nowe wyzwania i świetna atmosfera na planie!

💌 Z G Ł O S Z E N I A :
AKTORZY@UNAGIMEDIA.PL
Lub bezpośrednio przez link do formularza:
https://forms.gle/4v7V4yzyeDKXEz3LA

Prześlij:
✔️ aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki
✔️ wideowizytówkę
✔️ dyplom ukończenia studiów + link do Filmu Polskiego
✔️ numer telefonu kontaktowego
Szukamy ciekawych osobowości i świeżej aktorskiej energii NA PLAN 🎤

Wrocław czeka właśnie na Ciebie!
Udostępnij dalej , a może ktoś czeka na taką szansę!🥰

items.text:
WARSZAWA | 2 CZERWCA

Hej!

Jesteśmy studentami kierunku reżyserii na uczelni Społeczna Akademia Nauk.

Do realizacji naszego filmu dyplomowego szukamy dzieci w wieku 8–12 lat do udziału w jednej ze scen.

To świetna okazja, żeby zobaczyć, jak wygląda plan filmowy od środka, poznać proces tworzenia filmu i przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę przed kamerą.

Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego — liczy się otwartość, energia i chęć udziału w projekcie.

Projekt niekomercyjny.

Jeśli Twoje dziecko chciałoby wziąć udział w filmie, napisz do nas w wiadomości prywatnej i wyślij kilka zdjęć oraz wiek dziecka.

items.text:
**WE’RE BACK! - THE PRICE IS RIGHT TONIGHT SEASON 2**

*The Price is Right Tonight *hosted by Howie Mandel is back for season 2! And we'd love to see you apply!! Join our studio audience for a chance to come on down and play for big wins, big prizes and big money!

**DATES:**

Filming takes place in Toronto from June 23rd to 30th, 2026, with three daily tapings at 12:30 pm, 4:00 pm and 7:00 pm. 

**APPLICATION DETAILS:**

You must apply as a group of at least 4 people (including yourself), with the option to apply with up to 10 people total. Groups can include friends, family, or colleagues!

Complete the application below and submit a photo for each group member.

**ELIGIBILITY:**

Each applicant must complete their own section, review, and agree to the rules at the end of the form.

To be eligible to compete:
* All applicants must be 19+ at the time of application
* All applicants must have the right to live and work in Canada
* All applicants must be available to film in Toronto between June 23 - 30, 2026

Below is the application link for the show. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to [Casting@priceproductionsinc.com](mailto:Casting@priceproductionsinc.com)

APPLY HERE NOW: [https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/](https://thepriceisrighttonightseason2.castingcrane.com/)

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM FROM UNKNOWN TO LEAD ROLES ON NETFLIX
It Seems Like You've Done Everything Right. So How Come Nothing Is Moving?

You trained. You got the headshots. You got the reel. Maybe you even got the agent.
And yet you are sitting here wondering why nothing is moving.

How are you supposed to break into Netflix-level work when nobody actually explains the strategy behind it?

I am Freya Tingley. I’m from Perth. I was 14 when I started. No connections, no Hollywood map. By 17 I had signed with one of the biggest agents in town. At 18 I moved to LA and three months later I was a series regular on a Netflix show. Then Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood. Then Wendy Darling on ABC's Once Upon a Time.

It looks like luck from the outside. It was not.

What you are not being told is that most of the work happens before the audition room. The actors who book have
figured out how to engineer their own access. The ones who do not are still waiting to be discovered.

I have been getting a lot of messages from actors lately saying things like:

"I have an agent but no auditions."
"I am auditioning but not booking."
"I do not know what I am doing wrong."

What if the problem is not your talent?

What if it is the strategy, or the lack of one?

I run private 2-hour 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. We diagnose where you are stuck, build a custom plan, and you leave knowing exactly what to do next.

I would rather you have clarity than spend another year guessing.

If you know you need to move, DM me "COMMIT" to apply for a session.

What would it cost you to keep doing what you have been doing?

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people

topComments.text: Well I'm shooting independent films and surrounding myself with filmmakers but I rather do that while auditioning so I don't have to worry about not working but would still take u up because I need a big agency and connections to make sure I stay working.

items.text:
Casting Call For Fast Food Brand World Cup Ad
I’m currently looking to cast 4 actors for a promo shoot on Monday 8th June in Central Liverpool. The shoot is for a fast food chain where we will be filming a few videos for their social media pages advertising their new World Cup menu! Payment is £100 flat rate & food from the company will be provided on set too! Please bare in mind actors will be working around/with meat products too.

We’re ideally looking for 2x male & 2x female performers from different cultures & back grounds so we urge everybody to apply! 

To apply please send a recent headshot & showreel (if possible) to leomoorebusiness@gmail.com 

📆 Monday 8th June

⏰ 12-5pm

📍Central Liverpool

💰£100 Flat Rate

Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! items.text:
🌟 AUDITION NOTICE – DICK WHITTINGTON 🌟
Dreamworld Entertainments, in association with the Gladstone Theatre, are on the lookout for talented performers to join this year’s magical production of Dick Whittington! 🎭✨

We’re seeking triple-threat male and female performers for principal roles, as well as a talented Cat (strong singer with acro skills preferred) and Fairy.

🎤 Strong acting and vocal ability required

💃 Excellent movement skills essential

🎶 Prepare two contrasting songs

📄 Successful applicants will be sent audition sides

📍 Auditions will take place at the Gladstone Theatre, Port Sunlight

📅 Performers must be available from 27th November – 31st December and have a Liverpool base.

To register your interest, send your CV, Spotlight link/showreel and relevant details to:

📧 dreamworldprincesses@yahoo.co.uk

⏰ Registration closes Friday 12th June. Please note that auditions are by registration only.

We can’t wait to discover the stars of our 2025 pantomime adventure! ⭐🐱👠

#DickWhittington #Auditions #CastingCall #Pantomime #LiverpoolTheatre #MusicalTheatre #TripleThreatPerformer #ActingJobs #TheatreAuditions #GladstoneTheatre #DreamworldEntertainments

Must be available 27th Nov to 31st Dec and have Liverpool base. Auditions will be held at the Gladstone Theatre in Port Sunlight in June. Email dreamworldprincsses@yaho.co.u yahoo.co.uk to register by Friday 12th June. Please do not turn up if you have not registered.'

items.text:
Greetings to all qualified and experienced actors!
We are casting for an exciting movie filming in Mulderdrift, Krugersdorp, from June 22 to June 26, 2026. 

If you're interested, please submit resume, one full-body photo, a headshot, and your showreel to Sanny via whatsApp 078 121 4807

We are eager to fill the following roles:

1. Nthati

- Age: 17

- Female

- From Mafikeng

- Languages: Setswana/Sesotho

2. TUMI

- Age: 40s

- Female

- From Mafikeng

- Languages: Setswana/Sesotho

3. MAKI

- Age: 60s-70s

- Female

- From Mafikeng

- Languages: Setswana/Sesotho

4. SHIMANE

- Age: 17

- Male

- From Mafikeng

- Languages: Setswana/Sesotho

- Female

- From Mafikeng

- Female

Kamed Studio 
30 maja (sobota)
Zbiórka około 10.00
Plan w Otwocku 

Na plan serialu współczesnego szukamy statystów w różnym wieku. Gramy pacjentów szpitala.

Szukamy przede wszystkim osób które samodzielnie dojadą na plan (dobre połączenie kolejką SKM)

Stawka 130 zl. płatne gotówką po planie 
Jeżeli ktoś wybiera się na plan samochodem i zabierze ze sobą kilka osób- dopłata do paliwa w wysokości 50 zl.

Zgłoszenia z aktualnym zdjęciem na nr SMS 
731 738 797

Kamed Studio Warszawa 
29 maja - piątek- to już JUTRO
Tylko osoby z Warszawy 

MINI EPIZOD 
Stawka 200 zl.

Do małego epizodu szukamy kobiety I mężczyzny w wieku 25 - 45 lat. Kobieta koniecznie blond włosy, obydwoje bez widocznych tatuaży 
Epizody bez tekstu. Plan od około 10.00 do około 15.00

Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o zgłoszenia zawierające 
- imię I nazwisko 
- wiek
- aktualne zdjęcie
- wizytówkę w postaci linku do YouTube 

na adres

impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 

z dopiskiem w tytule EPIZOD

items.text:
Hi, all! I'm working with Noon Miracle on an upcoming Zoom table read of a feature film, and we're opening up casting for a few key roles. We're urgently seeking someone for the lead role of Andy Warhol, as well as all the other characters included in the brief.

A quick note - the poster says June 3rd for rehearsal, but this has recently been revised to June 4th. The rehearsal is not mandatory, but we find it's helpful to get a sense of pacing before the live read!

If you’d like to be a a part of bringing this brilliant story to life under the direction of an Emmy-nominated Hollywood director, we’d love to hear from you! Or, share it with a friend who you think would be perfect for the part.

Unfortunately, all roles are unpaid for this charity event, but if you have a couple of hours on Saturday evening, it's a great cause and an opportunity to work with a really exceptional cast.

Thanks for taking a look!

Based on true events.'

This is (partly) the story of how that happened.'

items.text:
Hi All,  

I'm a casting director and am looking for a young lad who is of Algerian, Tunisian or Moroccan heritage for a really good role in a feature film, shooting in London this summer.

This is a paid opportunity, and will be an Equity contract.

All the info is on the flyer, but please feel free to contact me if you have any questions (ideally using the email provided).

I would encourage you to first look me up on IMDb, my webste and the websites for the Casting Directors Guild (CDG) and Casting Directors Association (CDA).

Best wishes,

Sally McCleery

items.text:
Hello everyone! 

Sharing information about the upcoming PRACTICE LAB by PROJEKT EUROPA in London - all workshops are led by wonderful international artists!

**10 June 2026 - 18:00-20:00**- Chisenhale Dance Space, 64-84 Chisenhale Road, London, E3 5QZ.

**Ensemble Theatre Making with Halfpace Theatre **led by** **Megan Brewer 

This session looks at ways of building an ensemble as a foundation for devised work and how to build a welcoming environment for your collective. We’ll go over co-creating codes of conduct, exercises and warm-ups to foster team understanding and trust; how to take a survey of ‘who is in the room’; and a few ways to devise using collective movement and elements such as sound and lighting.

PRACTICE LAB is a curated series of workshops by PROJEKT EUROPA led by international theatre makers, offered in partnership with Chisenhale Dance Space in London. These workshops are aimed at sharing the wealth of skills and knowledge in the migrant artist community and creating new and unexpected connections between theatre makers from all communities.

Participants are asked to make a small contribution, starting at £5, to help cover programme costs.

items.summary:
Hello everyone! 

Sharing information about the upcoming PRACTICE LAB by PROJEKT EUROPA in London - all workshops are led by wonderful international artists!

**10 June 2026 - 18:00-20:00**- Chisenhale Dance Space, 64-84 Chisenhale Road, London, E3 5QZ.

**Ensemble Theatre Making with Halfpace Theatre **led by** **Megan Brewer 

This session looks at ways of building an ensemble as a foundation for devised work and how to build a welcoming environment for your collective. We’ll go over co-creating codes of conduct, exercises and warm-ups to foster team understanding and trust; how to take a survey of ‘who is in the room’; and a few ways to devise using collective movement and elements such as sound and lighting.

PRACTICE LAB is a curated series of workshops by PROJEKT EUROPA led by international theatre makers, offered in partnership with Chisenhale Dance Space in London. These workshops are aimed at sharing the wealth of skills and knowledge in the migrant artist community and creating new and unexpected connections between theatre makers from all communities.

Participants are asked to make a small contribution, starting at £5, to help cover programme costs.

For more information and to book, visit: [[https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6MURtkiwi5u3I_SjuOeBAfY7AhWr_i_KdAjMyVqhVAnbPHXVMkLj0S_xAWqA_aem_37e7tl3N7fomzbiT0SDj9A&brid=YWdncwF3oE3PfCy7A0jt9rzAm-C7)]([https://www.projekteuropa.org/lab](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.projekteuropa.org%2Flab%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExSGlsdWJrTE9ES1V1QTF2cHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6wH2CMLT7rt0F69kpeSpbP2xb2LbM9OutspDRlsbYsF5bpy77HRxa7r96Lmw_aem_yFDP_eO7ruhhw9vumhF_VA%26brid%3DYWdncwFNOV3hP8jxUEkazqmV3Nih&h=AUBpqUPyU0dHXZTC59jShCXyR0QWcXJG99MbQSIbjO2i38w0UKCKLdUNkBJmWvchtIOHBojgs88hkA9Iza3xjfQcKl3_MHG90oS0yhWAmo4Yw7NHhbQFBzmy-_3-GC5gDK6hcgyyPlROyQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUDmrSsYxuTJ93CtqBRxUqmGGyzMN-fumFjddGqenYoCv__WxU-R-rBxBLYUqkVWPEN-oJewkZ5Kg2_gSOJsp9rOvig5IxIXcdjqoRLJY8E3AoyiQpuq5gzN28QMaQQ9cq9-pr7jccDCk_HAPXrMnWqcMCRSWY3QIM6RCgN49Hvp))

items.title: Hello everyone!

items.text:
Get your** EARLY BIRD DISCOUNT before May 31st**! 

**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy** 
**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

>> **Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** 
>> **Organic Breathing & Image Work**
>> **Kutiyattam Traditional Theatre** (Kerala, India) 
>> **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 
>> **The Actor’s Energy and Presence** 
>> **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: **Suzana Nikolić**, Croatia 🇭🇷, **Remith Ramesh**, India 🇮🇳, **Gülhan Kadim**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Yiğit Sertdemir**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Jesper Michelsen**, Denmark 🇩🇰, **Ulrich Meyer-Horsch**, Germany 🇩🇪 

Guest artists: **Aparna Devi**, India 🇮🇳, **Claudia Munyengabe**, Burundi 🇧🇮, **Tarja Nyberg**, Finland 🇫🇮, **Toh Varatta**, Thailand 🇹🇭** Burcu Halacoglu**, Turkey 🇹🇷, **Gehad Hossam El Din**, Egypt 🇪🇬 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS** 
This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**
There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 
The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: Making Contact: Living Images 

Full announcement incl. application: https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/
Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text: Joe TenBroek, David Versace, Michael Pickard, and I want to give a huge shout-out to all the amazing creatives, collaborators, artists and all-stars that created this amazing Concept Pilot! We couldn't fit everyone into the video, so I ask you to please take a moment to check out The Hook IMDb page, and give these people the congratulations they deserve! Take a bow! Not too shabby for ST Park Productions first project!

sharedPost.text:
We wanted to do something special for the extraordinary cast and crew that we had aboard. We hope you enjoy the footage.

We are so grateful for the expertise, love, and support from these fine individuals. There is no concept pilot without you. Seriously. From the bottom of our hearts: Thank You.

Some may not be pictured here, due to limited BTS, but every single person on this project was so critical to it's success. Rock on, everyone!

Don't get Addicted, Get Hooked!!!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – MA STUDENT SHORT FILM (LONDON)
Hi everyone!

We are a group of three MA Visual Effects students in London currently developing a short live-action + CGI film exploring the unseen emotional experiences of wheelchair users and the feelings of exclusion or isolation that can arise in everyday situations.

We are looking for a wheelchair user actor (or performer with lived experience) to play the lead role in our short film.

About the role:

* Lead role in a ~1-minute short film

* A quiet, emotional, visually driven performance

* The story follows a wheelchair user in a casual setting with friends while visualising their internal thoughts and invisible struggles through cinematic VFX metaphors.

Shoot details:

📍 London

📅 TBA (end of May / beginning of June)

💰 All expenses paid 

We are committed to approaching this story with care, authenticity, and respect, and would love to collaborate with someone who connects with the project and would be interested in helping shape the portrayal.

If interested (or if you know someone who may be!), please comment below or send me a DM. We’d be happy to share more details and the project deck/script.

Thank you! ✨

items.text:
Casting Call: Middle-Aged Female Actor (Short Film)
Hello!

I’m currently casting for a short film that follows a mother and daughter reuniting at the daughter’s flat after six months apart. It’s an intimate, fly-on-the-wall chamber drama, shot entirely inside a London flat on a very small budget.

**The role: **
* Mother (playing age 50–60)
*  Warm, complex, emotionally grounded character

I have already cast the daughter, who is Welsh, so a Welsh actor would be ideal for authenticity but this is not essential.

**Shoot dates: **TBC, likely late July.

**Shoot length: **1-2 days.

**Location:** Bow, London.

**Please note that this is an unpaid role, though travel/expenses can be covered where needed. It’s a strong character-driven piece and will be a great collaborative experience with a small team.**

If you’re interested or would like more details about the story/character, feel free to DM me.

Thanks so much!
items.summary:

I’m currently casting for a short film that follows a mother and daughter reuniting at the daughter’s flat after six months apart. It’s an intimate, fly-on-the-wall chamber drama, shot entirely inside a London flat on a very small budget.

**The role: **
* Mother (playing age 50–60)
*  Warm, complex, emotionally grounded character

I have already cast the daughter, who is Welsh, so a Welsh actor would be ideal for authenticity but this is not essential.

**Shoot dates: **TBC, likely late July.

**Shoot length: **1-2 days.

**Location:** Bow, London.

**Please note that this is an unpaid role, though travel/expenses can be covered where needed. It’s a strong character-driven piece and will be a great collaborative experience with a small team.**

If you’re interested or would like more details about the story/character, feel free to DM me.

Thanks so much!
items.title: Casting Call: Middle-Aged Female Actor (Short Film)

items.text:
🐈‍⬛💰WEŹ UDZIAŁ W IDŹ NA CAŁOŚĆ
Szukamy ludzi z każdego zakątka Polski, którzy:

• Mają ogromny dystans do siebie i kochają dobrą zabawę 🤡

• Są kontaktowi, głośni i pełni pozytywnej energii ⚡

• Nie boją się zaryzykować dla wielkich wygranych!

•Mile widziane zgłoszenia z rodziną, grupą znajomych. 

🔥 DLACZEGO WARTO?

• Pula nagród rozbija bank: Samochody, luksusowe wycieczki zagraniczne, markowe prezenty i gotówka! 🚗✈️💰

• Gwarantowana kasa: Każdy uczestnik otrzymuje 120 zł netto za samo przybycie do studia!

•🎬Rywalizujesz tylko z osobami w studio, nie ma quizów, testów wiedzy, szanse większe niż w Lotto ! 

• Przygoda życia: Poczuj magię telewizji w profesjonalnym studio.

📅 SZCZEGÓŁY:

• Kiedy: Czerwiec i Lipiec (dogadamy z Tobą konkretny termin!)

• Gdzie: Warszawa (Szeligi, Transcolor Studio,Szeligowska 48) – dojazd we własnym zakresie.

• Dla kogo: Każdy 18+ Nie musisz mieć żadnego doświadczenia przed kamerą!

📩 JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Napisz do nas  e-mail: PAULINA@SCENERIA.COM.PL

Tytuł: TELETURNIEJ

W treści: Imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + Twoje aktualne zdjęcie.

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Applications are now open for Miss London England 2026.

This is not simply a beauty competition. It is London's official route to Miss England and Miss World.

We are looking for women with presence, ambition and something to say.

Whether your background is modelling, business, medicine, law, media, sport, the arts, or something entirely different, Miss London offers a platform to develop your profile, expand your network, support meaningful causes and represent one of the world's most influential cities.

Eligibility:
• Aged 16-27
• Hold a British passport
• Unmarried

No previous pageant experience is required.

If you have ever wondered whether you could do something like this, you probably should.

Apply:
missengland.info/enter-competition

Questions welcome via DM.

items.text:
Allround-TV geht völlig neue Wege mit Auftrags-Video-Produktionen in virtueller Umgebung. Wir erstellen komplette virtuelle Studios nach Ihren Vorgaben, setzen den Moderator, die Moderatorin via GreenScreen in die virtuelle 3D Umgebung, animieren die Szene mit Tracking-Kameras in Echtzeit und schalten Studiogäste, Interviewpartner, Experten auf Wunsch weltweit via Live-Stream zu. Eine fantastische Möglichkeit, Ihren Video-Content technisch auf der Höhe der Zeit zu erstellen. Ab sofort möglich im eigenen professionellen Video-Studio von Allround-TV in Altötting. Wir setzen Sie in Szene!
Montage & Screenshots © 2026 by Allround-TV

items.text:
CREW ISO: Birdland 

Feature adapted from On the Way to Birdland by Frank Morelli

Directed & Produced by current NYU Students

After hearing about his father's terminal illness, a naive teen runs away from home to find his estranged brother and bring his family back together.

Open to all but especially interested in working with Student Filmmakers/Filmmakers new to the industry

Director: Caroline Griffith
Producer: Kyra Mueller  

CONTACT: 

If you are interested please send over your name and role(s) of interest to birdlandfilm.general@gmail.com

INTEREST DEADLINE: June 29

Non-Union - Unpaid

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Title: Nail Salon

Genre: Drama

Non-union, unpaid

Food, IMDb credit, and reel footage provided

Filming Location: Miami/Orlando FL areas

Filming Dates: November 2026

Character Descriptions:

SUPPORTING: Connor (M, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity): knight in shining armor. Natalie’s new love interest. Very respectful of women and will go tooth and nail for the people he loves.

SUPPORTING: Officer Quinn (F, or presenting, 30s to 50s, open ethnicity): kind and compassionate woman who always wants to do what’s right. Very respectful of her superiors even when not necessary.

SUPPORTING: Officer Zambrano (M, or presenting, 40s to 60s, open ethnicity): sleazy and generally incompetent. Is only a cop for the power and looks. Stereotypical victim blamer and misogynist.

SUPPORTING: Ingrid (F, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity, disabled actress preferred): Grace’s new roommate and friend. Caring and calm. Due to her disability is extremely empathetic to the people around her. 

DAY PLAYER: Sara (F, or presenting, 60s+, white): Warren’s mother. Overbearing and strict. Only cares about herself.

DAY PLAYER: 911 Operator (open gender, open age, open ethnicity): typical 911 operator. VOICE OVER ONLY NOT REQUIRED ON SET.

DAY PLAYER: Hillary (F, or presenting, early to mid 20s, open ethnicity): Blake’s new girlfriend. As dramatic as he is. Juliet to his Romeo. In his face all along and finally got him to see her.

DAY PLAYER: Dr. Olivier (F, or presenting, 50s to 60s, open ethnicity): Blake and Hillary’s drama teacher. Prim and polished. Never likes anything out of place and cares more about her program than anything else.

*Do not share without my expressed permission*
*Only accepting submissions via email*
*Must be able to work as a local. No room and board or travel compensation*

PLEASE NOTE: If auditioning for Ingrid, please include in email if you are disabled and what disability you have if comfortable sharing. 

TO SUBMIT: We are accepting submissions until June 14th. Please send an email to skywardproductions3@gmail.com with CC to willb.musiq@gmail.com with reel or resume and a headshot. We look forward to hearing from you!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '၁၀၀ MaiSaton Nail Salon A Skyward Productions & Masters of magery Series Coming Soon'

sharedPost.text:
Seeking actors for a short film shooting in Metro Detroit during July/August!  Email eric@ericromanacts.com with resume and reel if interested and I'll get you sides!

COLE: (20-30's) A brooding bouncer at a seedy club who just wants to make an honest living and stay out of prison. His past catches up to him and a careless act puts someone he cares for in danger.

MARCY: (20's) A cocktail waitress working at a seedy club.  Keeps her club and private lives seperate but when she mixes the two, her world burns down.

MARCUS: (20-30's) A dangerous and down on his luck drug dealer with a score to settle.  After being cut off at the club he decides to take matters into his own hands with Cole.

JEFF: (20-30's) Marcy's naive husband.  A bit aloof and a stoner, Jeff has grown comfortable and lazy in his relationship with Marcy. After discovering a devastating secret, he decides to step up and be the man Marcy married.

Additional Roles: (Any) looking for a bartender, club dancers, and club goers!

items.text:
She is still casting.
DHANDA. Written by Shah Yasir. Directed by Ayeshah Alam. A short film by Dreamers HTX. Now casting in Houston.

We are looking for one exceptional South Asian woman who is not afraid of stillness, authority, and truth.

JEHAN ARA. Female. Early 40s. Stunning. Magnetic. Unshakeable. The kind of woman who does not walk into a room, she arrives. The emotional anchor of the entire film.

Dialogue in English with natural use of Urdu. Familiarity with the South Asian cultural world is essential.

To submit, send your headshot, bio or resume, and two to three lines on why this role speaks to you to dreamershtx@gmail.com by June 30, 2026.

Selected applicants receive full details and self-tape sides by July 7, 2026.

Tell us why you. Tell us why now. Tell us why this story.

Tag an actress who needs to see this.

items.text: Hi guys! Starting this fall, I’ll be splitting my time between LA and Vancouver, Canada. I have a beautiful 1-bedroom apartment in South Vancouver and I’m looking to connect with a female actress in LA who might be interested in occasional apartment swaps (LA/VAN), hosting each other from time to time, or something along those lines. Would love to connect if that sounds like something you’d be into. Thanks so much :) My IG is https://www.instagram.com/iammagalie/

items.text:
Web Series Casting!

TPWM, a light hearted web-series exploring masculinity in America is looking to cast for its first season. 

Who we are:

A group of emerging filmmakers working to bring an exciting Web Series to life and need your help! 

What do we need:

Actors! We have a full season to cast and need humble thespians such as yourself! Since there are a wide array of available roles, we're asking that everyone come in with one comedy and one dramatic monologue. 

When are auditions:

We'll be hosting auditions on Sunday Jun 7th. 

Where will they be:

Location will be emailed to you upon confirmation. 

For anyone who can't make it, we're asking for self tapes to be sent to [theproblemwmseries@gmail.com](mailto:theproblemwmseries@gmail.com)

What we offer:

Free Session with our Headshot Photographer

Food & Bev

In-Kind Creative Services

We are a no-budget production but we want to figure out how to make it work with you! So we're open to negotiate.

Thank you for taking the time. We're excited to get to know you!

topComments.text: Whatever you need I’m down to help
If you could use me, you would have to get me there. I'm willing to cover room and food.

For anyone who can't make it, we're asking for self tapes to be sent to [theproblemwmseries@gmail.com](mailto:theproblemwmseries@gmail.com)

What we offer:

Free Session with our Headshot Photographer

Food & Bev

In-Kind Creative Services

We are a no-budget production but we want to figure out how to make it work with you! So we're open to negotiate.

Thank you for taking the time. We're excited to get to know you!
items.title: Web Series Casting!

items.text:
Hey everyone! I’m currently a film student looking to get real on-set experience and start building my career in the industry.

I’m super passionate about filmmaking and want to learn as much as I can by actually being on set whether that’s as a production assistant, helping behind the scenes, or just being an extra and observing how everything runs.

If anyone has advice, knows of opportunities, or is working on projects that could use an extra set of hands, I’d really appreciate the chance to be involved. I’m reliable, eager to learn, and ready to put in the work.

Thanks in advance!

Based in Southern California

items.text:
Come and join us tomorrow! Half-price class. 😊 (Only a £3 deposit required)

DM to book. 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
WARSZAWA | 2 CZERWCA

Hej!

Jesteśmy studentami kierunku reżyserii na uczelni Społeczna Akademia Nauk.

Do realizacji naszego filmu dyplomowego szukamy dzieci w wieku 8–12 lat do udziału w jednej ze scen.

To świetna okazja, żeby zobaczyć, jak wygląda plan filmowy od środka, poznać proces tworzenia filmu i przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę przed kamerą.

Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego — liczy się otwartość, energia i chęć udziału w projekcie.

Projekt niekomercyjny.

Jeśli Twoje dziecko chciałoby wziąć udział w filmie, napisz do nas w wiadomości prywatnej i wyślij kilka zdjęć oraz wiek dziecka.

items.text:
POSZUKUJEMY DZIECI DO FILMU DYPLOMOWEGO SZKOŁY FILMOWEJ W ŁODZI! 🎬

ŁÓDŹ / okolice

Do filmu dyplomowego „Zadyszka” w reżyserii Katarzyny Kosajdy, realizowanego w Szkole Filmowej w Łodzi, poszukujemy dzieci w wieku około 2–3 lat do roli Tosi – młodszej córki głównej bohaterki.

Mile widziane są zgłoszenia bliźniaków lub rodzeństwa w podobnym wieku, które mogłoby wymieniać się podczas realizacji scen na planie.
* Miejsce zdjęć: Łódź
* Termin zdjęć: 8–16 lipca 2026
* Rola: Tosia (2–3 lata)
* Udział w projekcie jest płatny.

Szukamy dzieci swobodnie czujących się w nowych sytuacjach, otwartych na kontakt z ludźmi i chętnych do wspólnej zabawy na planie filmowym. Nie wymagamy wcześniejszego doświadczenia aktorskiego.

Przed rozpoczęciem zdjęć konieczne będzie dopełnienie formalności związanych z udziałem dziecka w produkcji filmowej. We wszystkich formalnościach pomożemy rodzicom i opiekunom.

„Zadyszka” to krótkometrażowy film dyplomowy opowiadający o rodzinie podczas turnieju tańca towarzyskiego, balansujący między humorem, napięciem i emocjonalnym chaosem.

Zgłoszenia (kilka aktualnych zdjęć dziecka oraz kontakt do rodzica/opiekuna) prosimy przesyłać na priv lub na adres: w.tomaszewska@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

items.text:
Do czerwcowych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) wciąż poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Gangster 2 (20-25) – masywny.
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Daniel (31) – Normalny typ, ma żonę, dziecko. Przeciętnej postury, w okularach. 
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

4. Emil „Macias” Mańczuk (34) – umięśniony, mile widziane tatuaże.
Daty: 11. i 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

5. Maciej „Wyga” Wyganowski (36) – lichwiarz; wysoki, sprawny fizycznie. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

6. Grzegorz Płocki (36) – bandzior, któremu zlecono pobicie; umięśniony, typ ulicznego dresa. 
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

7. Aleksander Sakowski (48) – bojaźliwy, w dobrej kondycji.  
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Actors —

We are currently developing and adapting De Nieuwe Ridderorde (1832), South Africa’s first play.

For almost 200 years, these characters and scenes have never truly been brought to life for a modern audience.

Starting this June, we will begin filming vertical storytelling scenes and performances based on the material.

This is an opportunity to:
• become one of the first actors to perform these characters,
• help shape the future adaptation of South Africa’s first play,
• and leave your own interpretation and creative mark on material that has been dormant for generations.

If you want to be part of bringing this forgotten piece of South African theatre history back to life, apply below:

https://forms.gle/Xdtiof1BziSTGWZG9

sharedPost.text: Join Boniface Development Lab & Perform Characters & Scenes From De Nieuwe Ridderorde - SA’s 1st Play, Published 1832 #vlytartacting

items.text:
Hello!  I'm planning to make a short film in the coming month and need a few actors.

Title: "Jude and the Bartender."  About a ten-minute film.

A young bartender finds himself panicking when all of the booze he was supposed to serve at a wedding suddenly disappears, and a mysterious St. Jude card shows up to save the day.

Characters:

BARISTA: 25-25, female, any race.

EMILY: 25-45, female, the wedding coordinator.

JUDE: 25-50, male, the caterer.

I likely have BEN (the bartender) cast already but if anything changes I'll post it here.

This will be a volunteer gig but I promise it'll be fun and shouldn't take more than a few days to shoot.  Beers will be on me when shooting is done.

If interested, email me at brettmanero@gmail.com!

topComments.text: What dates are you looking for?

items.text:
Stagebugz Theatre is thrilled to announce **auditions for actors ages 18+ for our upcoming world-premiere production of *****Cryptophasia*****! **

**Audition Information**

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th. 

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8)

**Dates**

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed****[ ****HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1IZan_G4JGy2t60LuXnOE8it60DEbmZNzfAH0-9jTy4U/edit?usp=sharing)****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals. 

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Compensation**

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit. 

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre. *

**Show Synopsis**

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand. 

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

**Character Breakdown**

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

 

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

 

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

 

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

 

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

**Production Team**

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

**About Us**

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects. 

For questions or to learn more, visit [[www.stagebugztheatre.com](www.stagebugztheatre.com)](http://www.stagebugztheatre.com) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.

sharedPost.text:
FULL DAY SCREEN ACTING MASTERCLASS
One day intensive screen Master class adult Workshop - Sunday 9th August with Film Director Andrew Gunn 

Andrew is an accomplished, versatile and highly visual drama director and optioned screenwriter whose diverse work encompasses film, premium television drama, comedy and short films.

Having previously directed some of the most high-profile dramas of recent years, Andrew is currently in pre-production with his film THE FEARS, produced by Finite Films.

For more info or  to book click : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

Workshop :
ages 16+
10am-5pm
£75
Studio 96 Kansas Avenue, Salford, Manchester , Media City, M50 2GZ

His workshops focus on several core areas to help actors thrive on camera:
Core Screen Acting: Techniques for subtle, natural close-up performances and working professionally with a camera crew.
Industry insights 
Self-Tapes & Auditions: Practical strategies on lighting, framing, and nailing the audition room.
The Director's Perspective: Insight into how to block, rehearse, and collaborate directly with directors on set
Become familiar with the craft and technique of screen acting as well as the director’s process of collaborating with actors on set. Discover the secrets of blocking, rehearsing and shooting a scene, and how to work with a professional camera crew. 

You will explore this through practical exercises, screenings, discussion and scripted acting workshops.

For more info or  to book click : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

items.text:
If you’ve been saying, “I need to meet more actors / filmmakers / directors / producers / and crew”,… this is your chance. 🎬

Get your tickets for Marble Academy’s 𝐀𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐬 & 𝐅𝐢𝐥𝐦𝐦𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐫𝐬 𝐍𝐞𝐭𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭, which is returning to HOME Mcr!

After a fantastic turnout last time, we’re looking to make this event just as exciting!

 

Are you an actor eager to land your next role? A director on the hunt for exceptional talent? A producer ready to discover fresh creativity? Or a crew member seeking your next big opportunity? This is the perfect opportunity to make connections which could spark collaborations!

 

𝐄𝐯𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐃𝐞𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐥𝐬:
**𝐃𝐚𝐭𝐞:** 𝐒𝐮𝐧𝐝𝐚𝐲, 𝟐𝟖𝐭𝐡 𝐉𝐮𝐧𝐞 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟔 
**𝐓𝐢𝐦𝐞:** 𝟐:𝟎𝟎 𝐏𝐌 – 𝟔:𝟑𝟎 𝐏𝐌 
**𝐕𝐞𝐧𝐮𝐞:** 𝐇𝐎𝐌𝐄 𝐌𝐜𝐫, 𝐌𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐡𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫, 𝐌𝟏𝟓 𝟒𝐅𝐍 

 

**𝐖𝐡𝐲 𝐬𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐝 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐛𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞?**
**Because one meaningful conversation can lead to: 
**Exciting auditions and casting calls 
** Collaborative short films from passionate creators 
** Paid gigs and valuable crew positions 
** Lasting creative partnerships that fuel your journey 

 

𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐭𝐨: 
** Be seen! Elevate your presence as a confident and talented actor
** Discover fresh talent if you’re a director 
** Embark on your next project as a producer 
** Dive into new adventures as a crew member 

 

- Purchase tickets at www.eventbrite.co.uk/e/actors-and-filmmakers-networking-event-tickets-1983730891497

 

Let’s come together to create an inspiring atmosphere where potential meets opportunity!
Share this with anyone looking to make a mark in the industry.
Let’s fill the room with those who truly make things happen.

𝐒𝐞𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐞! 🤝🎥

Bu Get Your'

Der Jedermann lebt von starken Figuren, besonderen Begegnungen und einem Ensemble, das jede Rolle auf seine eigene Weise mit Leben füllt. Wir freuen uns, Dirk Böhling als Teil unseres Ensembles in Bremen dabei zu haben. ✨

Informationen & Tickets:
www.jedermann-theater.de

#jedermann #jedermanntheater
#Bremen (Seebühne), #Weimar (Markt), #Coburg (Schlossplatz), #Graz (Kasematten), #Bayreuth (Friedrichsforum), #Dresden (Zirkus Sarrasani)

sharedPost.text:
📣 Mein Gesangs-Workshop geht in die nächste Runde! 🎶

In 4 intensiven Stunden arbeiten wir gemeinsam an:
🎤 Körperhaltung & Atmung
🎵 Stimm-Sound & Klangentfaltung
💪 Belten & Stimmkraft
🎶 Erweiterung des Stimmumfangs

Für alle Levels – Anfänger:innen genauso willkommen wie Fortgeschrittene! 🙌

Die Gruppe ist bewusst klein gehalten – max. 5 Personen – damit genug Raum für individuelle Arbeit und persönliches Feedback bleibt.

✨ Bonus bei Buchung: Ein zusätzliches 45-minütiges Einzelcoaching mit mir – als separater Termin ganz nach deinem Wunsch!

☕ Frisch gemahlener Kaffee & selbst gebackener Kuchen erwarten dich im charmanten Loft-Studio in Berlin Mitte.

📍 Anklamer Str. 38, 10115 Berlin-Mitte

Zwei Termine zur Auswahl:
🗓️ Sa., 25. Juli 2026 | 14–18 Uhr
🗓️ Sa., 26. September 2026 | 14–18 Uhr

🎟️ Kosten: 240 € | Max. 5 Personen

👉 Den Anmeldelink findest du unter Linktree in der Bio oder direkt unter:
www.singasong-behappy.de/gesangsworkshop

Ich freue mich auf dich!
Sing A Song – Be Happy! 🎶
Deine Bernadette 😊

#gesangsworkshop #workshop #singen #gesang #stimmbildung

items.text:
Seeking Male Actor for Private Conversational Role – London
Looking for a British-born South Asian male actor (mid 20s–40s) fluent in Urdu and English with a natural UK accent for a private in-person conversational role.

Requirements:

* Fluent Urdu and English speaker

* British-born with authentic UK accent

* Based in London

* Confident, calm, mature presence

* Able to naturally portray an older brother figure

* Comfortable improvising during conversation

* Acting or voice experience preferred but not essential

The role involves accompanying me during a brief personal meeting and helping communicate seriousness and sincerity in a respectful way.

This is a confidential/private situation, so full details will only be shared with genuinely interested applicants.

Paid role.

Please send:

* Age

* Area of London

* Languages spoken

* Voice note or short video intro

* Any acting/voice experience

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR POTENTIAL UNTITLED FOUND FOOTAGE COSMIC HORROR FEATURE
Hi @highlight

My name is Gary Francis Roche, and I am the writer/director/co-producer of an upcoming found footage cosmic horror feature, currently untitled. Over the coming weeks, we’ll be pitching to investors to secure financing for the project as production moves forward.

A little background about myself — I’m a UK-based independent filmmaker with over 8 years of experience across acting, camera operating, editing, storyboarding, animation, and VFX, working in short films, documentaries, corporate media, and genre filmmaking. Over the years, I’ve built strong creative partnerships with talented collaborators and niche companies who continue to support my work.

In 2024, I made my feature directorial debut with the indie screenlife/video game horror film **DEMO_N**, produced on a near-no budget of £10k. The film was later picked up for an exclusive release on Found TV before securing wider distribution through Terror Films Releasing (THE TAKING OF DEBORAH LOGAN, THE HELL HOUSE LLC franchise, THE LAST RADIO CALL). It is now streaming across 15 platforms, including Tubi Screambox Roku UK Apple TV, just to name a few, and with an additional 13 releases still pending.

The film also earned recognition from major horror outlets, with Dread Central praising it for injecting “new life into the screenlife subgenre,” while FANGORIA highlighted its “own spin with the video game element.” We also collaborated with FOUND to launch a playable demo based on the cursed in-film game *TAG! You’re Dead*, helping kickstart their gaming division, which you can download and play for FREE on Steam.

With this second feature, my team and I aim to push even further — crafting something ambitious, innovative, and distinctly original, building upon the visual style and creative voice developed in our first film. Unlike our previous effort, this project is being developed with the support of several established production houses in association with my newly registered company CONTEMPORARY PICTURES, whose identities I’ll remain anonymous about for the time being (a little tease for ya there).

At present, every crew position has been filled and is on standby, while 3 out of 7 cast roles have officially been secured.

We are currently casting:

• THREE female actors
• ONE male actor

If you feel you’d be a strong fit for this project and have the tenacity to take on these roles, please send your reels and/or Spotlight pages to:

[garyfrancisroche@gmail.com](mailto:garyfrancisroche@gmail.com)

We’ll be reaching back out once the project receives its official greenlight.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,

Gary

🤍 **MODEL & ACTOR CASTING CALL** 💙

**Otwieramy rekrutację dla nowych twarzy!**
Do naszych nadchodzących produkcji fotograficznych, reklamowych, teatralnych oraz fabularnych poszukujemy** dzieci w wieku 4–16 lat.**

Szukamy dzieci, które wyróżniają się urodą, energią i talentem. Mile widziane są osoby odważne, kreatywne i swobodnie czujące się przed aparatem oraz kamerą.

💙 Jeśli Twoje dziecko marzy o przygodzie w świecie modelingu i aktorstwa, wyślij zgłoszenie na adres: **biuro@elsastudio.pl**

**W treści maila prosimy o podanie:**
• imienia i nazwiska dziecka
• wieku
• wzrostu
• miejsca zamieszkania
• numeru telefonu do rodzica
• informacji o doświadczeniu aktorskim lub modelingowym

**Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć:**
🤍 aktualne zdjęcia portretowe oraz sylwetki
💙 krótkie nagranie, w którym dziecko przedstawia się i opowiada o swoich zainteresowaniach

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🤍
Elsa studio

items.text:
Hi, all! I'm working with Noon Miracle on an upcoming Zoom table read of a feature film, and we're opening up casting for a few key roles. We're urgently seeking someone for the lead role of Andy Warhol, as well as all the other characters included in the brief.

A quick note - the poster says June 3rd for rehearsal, but this has recently been revised to June 4th. The rehearsal is not mandatory, but we find it's helpful to get a sense of pacing before the live read!

If you’d like to be a a part of bringing this brilliant story to life under the direction of an Emmy-nominated Hollywood director, we’d love to hear from you! Or, share it with a friend who you think would be perfect for the part.

Unfortunately, all roles are unpaid for this charity event, but if you have a couple of hours on Saturday evening, it's a great cause and an opportunity to work with a really exceptional cast.

Thanks for taking a look!

Based on true events.'

sharedPost.text:
FULL DAY SCREEN ACTING MASTERCLASS
One day intensive screen Master class adult Workshop - Sunday 9th August with Film Director Andrew Gunn 

Andrew is an accomplished, versatile and highly visual drama director and optioned screenwriter whose diverse work encompasses film, premium television drama, comedy and short films.

Having previously directed some of the most high-profile dramas of recent years, Andrew is currently in pre-production with his film THE FEARS, produced by Finite Films.

For more info or  to book click : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

Workshop :
ages 16+
10am-5pm
£75
Studio 96 Kansas Avenue, Salford, Manchester , Media City, M50 2GZ

His workshops focus on several core areas to help actors thrive on camera:
Core Screen Acting: Techniques for subtle, natural close-up performances and working professionally with a camera crew.
Industry insights 
Self-Tapes & Auditions: Practical strategies on lighting, framing, and nailing the audition room.
The Director's Perspective: Insight into how to block, rehearse, and collaborate directly with directors on set
Become familiar with the craft and technique of screen acting as well as the director’s process of collaborating with actors on set. Discover the secrets of blocking, rehearsing and shooting a scene, and how to work with a professional camera crew. 

You will explore this through practical exercises, screenings, discussion and scripted acting workshops.

For more info or  to book click : https://screenplayacting.com/product/one-day-intensive-screen-masterclass-film-director-andrew-gunn/

🎨🎤🎧 EXHIBITION PARTY NIGHT – ONE NIGHT ONLY! 🎧🎤🎨

Join us for an unforgettable evening where art, music, culture, and entertainment come together under one roof at LOUD Lounge, Kingston Upon Thames.

📅 Date: 26th June 2026
📍 Venue: LOUD Lounge, Queen Elizabeth Road, Kingston Upon Thames, KT2 6RH
🕕 Exhibition: 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM
🎉 After Party: Until Midnight

✨ Featuring:

🎨 Exclusive Art Exhibition & Artwork Unveiling
with Bailey James (@officialbaileyjames)

🎤 Live Performances
🔥 Original Memzee (@originalmemzee)

Owned by Scott Garcia (@scottgarcia)

⚠️ IMPORTANT ENTRY REQUIREMENTS ⚠️

🎟️ Tickets are OBLIGATORY for entry.

🆔 Valid ID is required upon entry.
Accepted forms of identification include:
✔️ Passport
✔️ Driving Licence
✔️ Government-Issued Identification

Please ensure you bring valid identification to avoid disappointment.

🎟️ Limited tickets available – secure yours today:
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/exhibition-party-night-tickets-1990339250276

This exclusive event is designed to bring together artists, musicians, performers, business professionals, creatives, and music lovers for a night of inspiration, networking, and unforgettable entertainment.

Don’t miss one of Kingston’s most exciting creative events of the year!

🎨🎤🎧 EXHIBITION PARTY NIGHT – ONE NIGHT ONLY! 🎧🎤🎨

Join us for an unforgettable evening where art, music, culture, and entertainment come together under one roof at LOUD Lounge, Kingston Upon Thames.

📅 Date: 26th June 2026
📍 Venue: LOUD Lounge, Queen Elizabeth Road, Kingston Upon Thames, KT2 6RH
🕕 Exhibition: 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM
🎉 After Party: Until Midnight

✨ Featuring:

🎨 Exclusive Art Exhibition & Artwork Unveiling
with Bailey James (@officialbaileyjames)

🎤 Live Performances
🔥 Original Memzee (@originalmemzee)
🔥 Shocka (@shocka_artist)
🔥 Kazz Khalif (@kazzkhalif)
🔥 Fkeen 40 (@fkeen_40)

📺 Follow Original Memzee TV:
https://youtube.com/@originalmemzeetv?si=9pGrgHs4hke3GoTa

🎧 Live DJ Entertainment
🌟 Special Guests
🍸 Premium Lounge Experience
🤝 Networking Opportunities for Creatives, Artists, Entrepreneurs & Music Industry Professionals

🏆 Hosted at LOUD Lounge (@loudloungekingston)
Owned by Scott Garcia (@scottgarcia)

✨ Campaign Creative Direction & Management by Michel Villalobos (@michel_villalobos26)

⚠️ IMPORTANT ENTRY REQUIREMENTS ⚠️

🎟️ Tickets are OBLIGATORY for entry.

🆔 Valid ID is required upon entry.
Accepted forms of identification include:
✔️ Passport
✔️ Driving Licence
✔️ Government-Issued Identification

Please ensure you bring valid identification to avoid disappointment.

🎟️ Limited tickets available – secure yours today:
https://www.eventbrite.com/e/exhibition-party-night-tickets-1990339250276

This exclusive event is designed to bring together artists, musicians, performers, business professionals, creatives, and music lovers for a night of inspiration, networking, and unforgettable entertainment.

Don’t miss one of Kingston’s most exciting creative events of the year!

Official Partners & Featured Accounts
