# 📸 **TFP SWIMWEAR / BEACH EDITORIAL SHOOT – ***ZADAR*

Photographer based in Zadar looking for models for a swimwear / beach editorial collaboration (TFP).

**Concept:** natural light, beach lifestyle, natural lighting.

📍 Location: Zadar / nearby beaches
👙 Style: swimwear / summer editorial
📅 Date: 07.06.2016 - 11.06.2026

**You will receive:** edited professional photos for portfolio + tag credits

**Looking for:** beginner or experienced models open to collaboration

DM with photos / Instagram if interested.

@lauramendes_lens

Casting 3 grandmas (senior women 60s-80s). Legal grandma status not necessary. Bonus points if you apply with your friends.

Professional video game players will be teaching you how to play a game, and you will compete against other grandmas to determine the **greatest grandma. **Video will be posted on youtube.

Rate is $40/hr for 5 hours ($200). Shoot is Wednesday June 3, sometime between 9-5 in Vancouver. Project is non - union.

To apply please send a headshot, some information about you, and a reel if available. Deadline Sunday May 31st

Email to: danielfilmSR@gmail.com

items.text:
Hey everyone!

I'm a casting producer for Property Brothers and casting is now OPEN for homeowners with big reno dreams (and maybe a few “what did we get ourselves into?” moments ) in Vancouver!

We’re looking for:
• Homeowners who have **recently purchased a home**
• A minimum renovation budget of **$75K**
• At least **3 rooms** in need of renovation
• Availability for filming in **Fall 2026**

Feel free to apply: [https://www.drewandjonathan.com/casting/](https://www.drewandjonathan.com/casting/)

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

topComments.text: Hey. Have you ever thought of doing renos for seniors living in mobile homes? Like me, my home is showing signs of old age and can't afford the upkeep or avoiding the scams/overpricing seniors, especially since us baby boomers are living longer too.🤪
Why in the world would anybody do this, so basically it’s a cosmetic renovation that you have to pay at least $75,000 without a say in the outcome. What in the world would you get out of it?

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL:  JESSICA**

**Halfway Pictures is now casting JESSICA, a supernatural horror feature film.**

Paid · Non-Union

Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · reads as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · reads as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s
Olivia — Supporting · Female · reads as 7
David — Supporting · Male · mid-30s

Submission deadline: June 17, 2026
Auditions: June 20, 2026, 4:00–8:30 PM
Rate: $200/day
Shoot dates: July 1–14, 2026

Airfare and lodging will be provided for selected actors coming from outside Winnipeg, including from the United States.

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

**Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.**

sharedPost.text:
Ochota na orzeźwienie? Brzmi jak plan! Trwa casting do reklamy znanego napoju! 

! NOWY CASTING ! ROLE MÓWIONE ! WYSOKIE STAWKI !

Do dynamicznej, energetycznej reklamy popularnego napoju poszukujemy naturalnych, charyzmatycznych osób z prawdziwą energią!

Poszukujemy:

Główny bohater- Mężczyzna 20-40 lat, rola mówiona. Dobrze zbudowany. Mile widziane długie włosy, ale nie są konieczne.

PRZYJACIELE — DZIEWCZYNY Kobiety 20–25 lat — epizod. Różne typy urody. Mile widziane charakterystyczne cechy.

PRZYJACIELE — CHŁOPCY Mężczyźni 20–25 lat — epizod. Różne typy urody. Mile widziane charakterystyczne cechy.

STAWKI:

Od 5 do nawet 12 000 !!!

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:

Zgłoszenia: do 27.05 do godz. 18:00 

Recall: 31.05 (niedziela)

Przymiarki: 3.06 i 5.06

Zdjęcia: 8.06/Warszawa

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl 

Link do castingu + opis scenek do nagrania:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting060/

Tytuł: 050

Gotowy/a na energetyczny zastrzyk adrenaliny? Czekamy na Ciebie!

items.text:
Do czerwcowych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) wciąż poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Gangster 2 (20-25) – masywny.
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Daniel (31) – Normalny typ, ma żonę, dziecko. Przeciętnej postury, w okularach. 
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

4. Emil „Macias” Mańczuk (34) – umięśniony, mile widziane tatuaże.
Daty: 11. i 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

5. Maciej „Wyga” Wyganowski (36) – lichwiarz; wysoki, sprawny fizycznie. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

6. Grzegorz Płocki (36) – bandzior, któremu zlecono pobicie; umięśniony, typ ulicznego dresa. 
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

7. Aleksander Sakowski (48) – bojaźliwy, w dobrej kondycji.  
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe (nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne)

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu

items.summary:
Do czerwcowych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) wciąż poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Gangster 2 (20-25) – masywny.
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Daniel (31) – Normalny typ, ma żonę, dziecko. Przeciętnej postury, w okularach. 
Data: 10. czerwca
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

4. Emil „Macias” Mańczuk (34) – umięśniony, mile widziane tatuaże.
Daty: 11. i 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

5. Maciej „Wyga” Wyganowski (36) – lichwiarz; wysoki, sprawny fizycznie. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY
Data: 12. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto

6. Grzegorz Płocki (36) – bandzior, któremu zlecono pobicie; umięśniony, typ ulicznego dresa. 
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

7. Aleksander Sakowski (48) – bojaźliwy, w dobrej kondycji.  
Data: 11. czerwca 
Stawka: 500 zł netto 

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

items.title: Do czerwcowych odcinków serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) wciąż poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

items.text:
Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

- Konrad Sołtysik (45) – stalker Anny, zleceniodawca pobicia. Średnia budowa ciała, kuleje. Ubrany w stylu „tania elegancja”. Skryty, obsesyjny, przekonany, że Anna potrzebuje jego ochrony. 
3 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 600 zł netto

- Tomasz Drzewosz   (38) – ofiara pobicia, mąż Anny. Sprawny fizycznie mężczyzna, trochę zaniedbany, z zarostem, brzuszkiem piwnym. Nadużywa alkoholu, sprawca przemocy domowej. 1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 ZŁ netto

- Mateusz Malik (36) – sprawca pobicia, działał na zlecenie, pracuje jako dostawca jedzenia. Sprawny fizycznie, silny, tzw. „byczek”. Ma za sobą wyrok za rozbój. Małomówny.  1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Sąsiad Grzegorz Siwiec  (42) – sąsiad z bloku Tomasza i Anny, skonfliktowany z Tomaszem o miejsce parkingowe. Tęgi, głośny, szybko się irytuje, ubiera się w dresy. 2 sceny
DATA: 9.06
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Radek Radosław Blajer (35) – diler, niższy, grubszy, w szarej bluzie i jeansach.  1 scena
DATA: 8.06
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.title: Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

items.text:
hej, szukamy aktorów do nowego sezonu Trudnych Spraw:)
Helena Taraszewska (39 - 45l.)– żona bohatera. 

Posiada własny sklep. Ubiera się w sukienki. Bez makijażu i fryzury. Włosy gładko zaczesane. Ma kompleks z powodu swojego wyglądu. Bardzo kocha męża, zazdrosna o pierwszą żonę Piotra. Z powodu tej zazdrości gnębi Piotra. 

DNI ZDJĘCIOWE: 9 i 10 czerwiec

Zuzanna Lenartowicz (35 - 41l.) – pierwsza żona bohatera. Wdowa. 

Wyrazista, wysoka, szczupła, atrakcyjna. 

Szczegóły: Kobieta pełna życia; lekkomyślna, wybuchowa, temperamentna. Uwielbia swojego jedynego syna.

Przez większość scen porusza się na wózku inwalidzkim, w dwóch scenach chodzi, opierając się na lasce

DNI ZDJĘCIOWE: 9 czerwiec

Niemowlę - 2 dni zdjęciowe po godzince

DNI ZDJĘCIOWE: 8 i 9 czerwiec

pieniążki płacone zaraz po planie w gotówce, stawka ustalana na priv

zgłoszenia również proszę wysyłać na priv:)

🎬ZABŁYŚNIJ NA EKRANIE!🎬
Masz dyplom szkoły aktorskiej - być może właśnie Ciebie szukamy! ❤️‍🔥
Do cyklicznego serialu realizowanego we Wrocławiu poszukujemy aktorek i aktorów po szkołach filmowych oraz teatralnych
Każda rola to główna postać jednego odcinka!

👉Zdjęcia realizowane są w różnych terminach, zgłoś się, porozmawiajmy - znajdziemy odpowiedni termin na zdjęcia właśnie dla Ciebie ☺️
👉Stawka: 3000 zł za 3 dni zdjęciowe
👉Zapewniamy hotel oraz zwrot kosztów dojazdu
👉Nowa ekipa, nowe wyzwania i świetna atmosfera na planie!

💌 Z G Ł O S Z E N I A :
AKTORZY@UNAGIMEDIA.PL
Lub bezpośrednio przez link do formularza:
https://forms.gle/4v7V4yzyeDKXEz3LA

Prześlij:
✔️ aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki
✔️ wideowizytówkę
✔️ dyplom ukończenia studiów + link do Filmu Polskiego
✔️ numer telefonu kontaktowego
Szukamy ciekawych osobowości i świeżej aktorskiej energii NA PLAN 🎤

Wrocław czeka właśnie na Ciebie!
Udostępnij dalej , a może ktoś czeka na taką szansę!🥰

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
🎬 Szukamy praktykantki/praktykanta do szkoły filmowej Speakers Avenue!

Jeśli interesuje Cię film, produkcja, organizacja planów zdjęciowych i chcesz zobaczyć od środka, jak powstają etiudy filmowe oraz kursy filmowe – zapraszamy do współpracy.

W najbliższych miesiącach będziemy realizować:
📽️ etiudy filmowe,
🎥 kursy operatorskie,
🎬 kursy reżyserskie,
🌍 warsztaty operatorskie prowadzone w języku angielskim.

Szukamy osoby, która chciałaby zdobyć praktyczne doświadczenie i wesprzeć nas w organizacji tych działań. Nie wymagamy wcześniejszego doświadczenia filmowego – ważniejsze są zaangażowanie, dobra organizacja pracy i zainteresowanie branżą.

Oferujemy:
✨ możliwość poznania pracy szkoły filmowej od kulis,
✨ udział w realizacji projektów filmowych,
✨ współpracę z twórcami i uczestnikami kursów,
✨ elastyczne godziny praktyk,
✨ referencje po zakończeniu współpracy.

Jeśli brzmi to interesująco, wyślij kilka słów o sobie oraz CV w wiadomości prywatnej lub na adres: closeup@speakersavenue.com

Będzie nam miło poznać osoby, które chcą rozwijać się w świecie filmu i zdobywać doświadczenie przy realnych produkcjach.

#film #praktyki #staż #szkołafilmowa #produkcjafilmowa #filmowcy #warszawa

🎭Calling all North Yorkshire based actors!🎭

We are holding a monologue slam Stephen Joseph Theatre on 13th June as a part of @The Scarborough Fringe

To help us get to know professional actors across North Yorkshire we’d love to build connections with you! 

Bring along a piece of your own work or a monologue of your choice.

Get in touch with us to take part www.rocketlines.co.uk

tickets for audience available here:

https://sjt.uk.com/events/scarborough-fringe-monologue-slam

items.text:
Does your child love acting/drama, being creative and making new friends?

Join us this August for 3 unforgettable days of screen acting, creativity, and on camera fun!
🎥 Build bold characters, nail self-tapes, perform on camera and receive filmed scenes after the course!

📅 Dates: 4th, 5th, 6th August 
👥   Ages 8-16: 10:00am – 1:00pm
📍 Location: All Hallows RC High School, Salford
Cost: £75 for the full 3-day course

🎟️ Limited places available and the booking is now open!
Don’t miss out – sign up now via our website!
🔗 https://www.oddityacting.com/book-online

sharedPost.text:
A Charlie Brown Adventure on the Battle River Rail 

An interactive murder mystery created by YOU!

The apocalypse has come and the Charlie Brown gang has grown up. Who did they become? Heroes, survivors, schemers, wanderers... or murderers?

Choose a character you love and help create their story. Together we'll build relationships, rivalries, secrets, and decide who lives, who dies, and who has blood on their hands.

We'll begin online, discovering who our characters are and how they're connected. After the summer, we'll meet in person during September and October to develop chemistry and prepare for the event.

Performance Dates:
🚂 November 29 & 30
Battle River Rail

Who do you want to be?

And what are you willing to do to survive?

https://infiniteimaginationtt.ca/murder-mystery/

 #charliebrown #murdermystery #peanuts #ADFA #BGC #LocalTheatre Camrose Arts Society  @saltycourt @cmpcamrose Camrose Composite Playhouse @thesweeteriecamrose @the_waterworks_players The Beaverhill Players

items.text:
NOW CASTING for a new YouTube Show

Super Delicious is now casting men who want to spend a a couple hrs having fun and trying to beat a lie detector! If you don't think you can actually beat one but would still love to give it a try please still apply. Also flyer says LA but surrounding areas are welcome too if you are willing to make the drive.

We have filmed 5 episodes of the show so far and every guy has told me how much fun they have had. Only 2-3 hrs of your day and you get to challenge yourself.

superdelicioustvcasting@gmail.com

Must apply before June 15th but the earlier you apply means you have a better shot. Filming takes place June 19th in Hollywood in the afternoon.

items.text:
A very beautiful and special project is being implemented soon by the Parousia Acting Craft Collective under the direction of Molly Caliger @mollycaligervoice at the Kallirois Theater. We will be happy to have you with us, in a play based on the ancient Greek Myth of Philomele and Procne in the English language. A play that explores human passions, fears and the price that women have paid throughout time for the courage to remain true to themselves. 
PRE-SALE
TICKET SERVICES
– online: [www.ticketservices.gr](https://www.ticketservices.gr)
– by phone: 2107234567
– ticket office: Panepistimiou 39, Athens

items.text:
**MANCHESTER CASTING (PAID)**

We’re looking for a confident male actor aged between 18-28 years old based in Manchester to be involved with a new documentary filming this June.

The actor will be portraying a contributor who we aren't able to show on camera in order to protect their identity and anonymity. 

You must be comfortable with portraying a 'roadman' type persona and be able to digest background material on the contributor in order to portray them accurately. 

Ideal candidates:
* Comfortable and confident in front of the camera
* Living in Manchester (Near Withington or surrounding areas preferred)

If this is of interest please email oliviaryan.talent@gmail.com with the subject heading **MALE ACTOR, YOUR AGE & LOCATION**. Please link a portfolio or any content that may be helpful with understanding your acting abilities in response to this callout.

Successful applicants will be transferred from the casting producer Olivia to the production company if selected.

This is a talent presenter-led documentary and your involvement would be a 1-1 chat with this presenter. Filming is taking place this month and you must be available for one day on either a Saturday or Sunday (exact date tbc).

items.text:
My name is Kels and I'm the 3rd AD for Inevitable, a short sci-fi film directed and produced by Film Production lecturers at the University of Winchester, Hampshire. Filming will take place on campus in mid-June. Although this opportunity is unpaid, lunch will be provided on both shooting days.

I'm looking for 20+ extras to act as students in a classroom aged 18-30 with no previous acting experience needed! If you're interested, please get in touch via my email.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'EXTRAS CAST CALL INEVITABLE A student exposes her professor's neural data harvesting system, but fighting will only end in her becoming part of it SHOOTING Monday 15th June- Tuesday 16th June Lunch will be provided LOCATION West Downs Centre, University of Winchester EXTRAS NEEDED Student extras aged 18-30 If interested, please email Kels Jordan: k.jordan.2 k.jordam.24@unimail.winchester.c'

items.text:
CASTING CALL - LONDON
Hathaleen: The Unexpected Journey to Palestine is a satirical black comedy drama PLAY about a British Zionist who unexpectedly travels to Palestine to prove to his ex-girlfriend that he isn't a Zionist, the reason for their breakup.

We are currently looking for a Jewish actor in 30/40s to play the role of an Israeli soldier.

The 90 minute play is about the Israel-Palestine conflict so requires actors who are comfortable dealing with that sensitive subject matter as well as using (non-firing) weaponry.

We will have a preview show on either 6th July or 10th July at The Source theatre before going to Camden Fringe in August and hopefully Lambeth Fringe in October.

Looking for actors who are available for all performances. Rehearsals will take place every Sunday until 5th July (and then additionally 24/25th July)

Unfortunately this is an unpaid job offer but travel will be reimbursed and actors will receive the box split for their performances.

Please email u3008723@uel.ac.uk if you wish to apply

items.text:
Hi actor friends, Amazing Theatre Co. is looking to cast a Non-Equity, AA female, 30's-50's, to play Fannie in their upcoming production of "Flyin' West", a drama, by Pearl Cleage. They are doing 4 shows: July 11, 12, 18 & 19. All performances are at 2 PM (1 PM call times), at The Black Rock Center for the Arts in Germantown, Md. Pays a $300 stipend + an additional $100 for gas, after the shows close. Rehearsals are in Sandy Spring, Md & Laytonsville, Md, on Monday & Thursday evening's from 7 PM-9 PM & on Saturday's from Noon-4 PM.  If interested & available for all shows, the majority of the pre-tech rehearsals June 4 - July 2, and all tech rehearsals July 6-10, please contact Alice Thomas at amazingtheatre@gmail.com. They are looking to cast this asap, and before Thursday's rehearsal, and for the actor cast to be able to attend thr next rehearsal, on Thursday. I am in the play, as well.
Thanks!

items.text:
Hello everyone!
I’m reaching out again about our independent theatre project based on Pirandello’s Six Characters in Search of an Author.

We are working on a selected part of the play in depth, using deep text analysis in the tradition of the Moscow Art Theatre and Stanislavski’s technique.

Unfortunately, one of our actors is no longer able to continue rehearsals with us due to technical reasons, so we are now looking for an actor to step into the role of the Leading Actor.

This is an unpaid independent project. However, the final performance will be used as material to share with producers, with the goal of developing the project into a full production in the future.

We rehearse twice a week — Wednesday evenings and Saturday mornings — and the work will culminate in a public showing, most likely in mid-July at the NuBox Theater at John DeSotelle Studio.

Directed by Raushaniia Rakhimova.

You can see my work here:

https://vimeo.com/user15820557

If you are interested or have any questions, please feel free to message me or email me at raurahimova@gmail.com.

SERIOUS APPLICATIONS ONLY PLEASE 

We look forward to your application!

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — FAMILY PHOTO SHOOT OPPORTUNITY **

**Great Wolf Lodge Pocono Mountains | June 10th, 2026 **

Looking for fun, energetic families to participate in an upcoming lifestyle photo shoot at Great Wolf Lodge Poconos. Preferred to have 4+ people per family with children in the 4-11 year old range. 

**ABOUT THE SHOOT **

The concept features a relaxed, elevated resort atmosphere with stylish outdoor gathering spaces, family-friendly activities, food & beverage moments, and social lifestyle imagery. The campaign aims to showcase a more upscale guest experience while still capturing the fun and energy families love about Great Wolf Lodge. 

**Important Notes **

● This is primarily an **outdoor lifestyle shoot **

● **No swimwear or waterpark photography will be required **

● Talent will be photographed enjoying outdoor resort-style activities and social spaces 

● Wardrobe will focus on polished, elevated, casual summer apparel 

We’re looking for families who can naturally interact on camera and help create warm, aspirational, authentic vacation moments. 

**SHOOT DATES **

**Stay Schedule - **1 Great Wolf Dr, Scotrun, PA 18355

● **Check-In: **Tuesday, June 9, 2026 

● **Shoot Day: **Wednesday, June 10, 2026 

● **Check-Out: **Thursday, June 11, 2026 

**Tentative Production Schedule **

● Evening of 6/9: Wardrobe Check / Prep / Fitting, Prep Time: Approx. 1–2 hours 

● 6/10 Shoot Time: Approx. 6 hours total in the evening

**WHAT SELECTED FAMILIES RECEIVE **

**Lodging Included **

Complimentary lodging for the duration of the shoot stay: 

● Nights of **6/9 and 6/10 **

● Check-out on **6/11 **

Room accommodations will be based on family size. 

**SHOOT COMPENSATION & INCENTIVES **

**Compensation Package Includes:**

**Production / Stay Package **

Includes: 

● Lodging 6/9 and 6/10 (check-out 6/11) 

● (4) Paw Passes *(valued at $99.99 each) *

● Breakfast + Lunch Vouchers 

**1-Night Future Stay Voucher **

Valid between: 

**6/10/26 – 6/10/27 **

**Includes: **

● Kids Cabin Suite or similar 

*(up to $700 value) *

● (4) Paw Passes 

*(valued at $99.99 each) *

*Future stay vouchers are subject to blackout dates and room availability.*

**IDEAL TALENT **

We are seeking: 

● Real families (children ages 4-11) 

● Comfortable in front of camera 

● Energetic and expressive personalities 

● Families excited about waterpark/family resort experiences 

**INTERESTED? **

Please submit the following to Heather at [gwlcasting@gmail.com](mailto:gwlcasting@gmail.com):

● Family size 

● Names & ages of children 

● Recent family photos 

● Availability for June 9–11, 2026 

Please submit info and photos by Tuesday 6/2/26. We need to select families ASAP. Thank you!

items.text:
Paid casting call in Chicago searching for male actor and Child actors!
Thanks everyone! We are DePaul directing major MFA students, doing our master degree thesis short film. 

Please let me know if you are interested or know anyone! Paid. 

COMPENSATION : Paid / Stipend + Meals + Credit + Copy

SHOOT DATES: July 17-27,2026 (specific dates depend on role)

Email us: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com

Playful, sweet, curious, emotionally open. wants CHICAGO AREA Sebastian. Quiet, guarded, and brother, keeps he journey, sadness before behind Looking for natural who feels real, polished performing. too Looking emotion actor can stiliness, behavior. PIETRO MALE LATE 30s MID CHICAGO AREA Sebastian and overwhelmed, Italy. He's Looking Samuel. Tired, loving, day emotionally stretched thin. warmth, restraint, and grounded CAN BRING DEPTH To SUBMIT: HEADSHOT RESUME AUTHENTICITY SUBMIT TO: SHOOT DATES: (Specific dates depend Paid Stipend role) Meals submissions from parent/legal guardian.)'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL KNOTS SEEKING: PIETRO Male, late 30s-mid 40s For a student thesis short fil Pietro is the father of Sebastian and Samuel. Tired, loving, and overwhelmed. he is trying to hold the family together on the day th leave for Italy. He is practical caring, but emotionally stretch thin. Looking for an actor with warmth, restraint, and a grounded presence. Shoot Dates: day between July 17-27 Location: Chicago area Compensation: Paid, stipend copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self-tape to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com'
May be an image of text

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SEEKING: SEBASTIAN For Male, student thesis short film Sebastian. Quiet, guarded, and emotionally mature in some ways, but still very much child. On the day his family is leaving for Italy, he secretly sets out to visit his mother' grave before too late. He loves deeply, but he hides everything behind silence, distance, and anger. Looking for an actor who can carry emotion through stillness, looks, and small behavior. Shoot Dates: days between July 17-27 Location: area Compensation: Paid stipend +copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com (For minors, submissions must come from parent/guardian.)'

items.text:
You are in for a grandma-granddaughter, human-organ-smuggling-to-Poland road trip of a lifetime. But in order to film it, we have to rent the car, pay the gran, buy food and, and, and… well, all of that requires money. And technology too.

We are a team of women creatives making **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")**, a darkly funny road-trip film set in the 1990s.

Sasha, a troubled woman tangled in organized crime, is tasked with smuggling a cooler of human organs from Ukraine to Poland. Her unpredictable grandmother unexpectedly joins the journey, turning the trip into something neither of them expects.

We're currently competing for funding through Decentralized Pictures and would love your support.

**How to help:**
1. Open Chrome on your laptop.
2. Visit: https://app.decentralized.pictures/.../6a11e333fde507ae32...
3. Find **OH, GRAN! ("НУ, БА!")** in the Filmmakers Assistance Grant.
4. Vote and leave a review.
5. Share with anyone who supports independent cinema.

If you're a filmmaker, Decentralized Pictures is also a great resource for discovering film funding opportunities.

[[https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)](https://tenor.com/view/thelma-and-louise-vintage-girl-power-we-can-do-it-to-the-end-gif-12184359)

sharedPost.text:
Der Gesang löst Blockaden, lässt Emotionen frei und setzt Endorphine frei!

Die richtige Atmung, welche im Zwerchfell, der Brust und den Flanken im seitlichen Rücken stattfindet, gibt dem Ton den Halt - die sogenannte Stütze ! 
Unentbehrlich für das Singen!

Möchtest auch Du mehr über all‘ diese Zusammenhänge erfahren , dann melde Dich!

Ihre / Eure
Annette Kuhn 
www.annette-kuhn.de
Groß Gerau

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für die regelmäßige Content-Produktion unserer Social-Media-Kanäle suchen wir für **Ende Juni** sympathische Gesichter vor der Kamera! Wir drehen in zwei wunderschönen Hotels an der Ostsee und suchen dafür unterschiedliche Profile (Vorkenntnisse sind nicht notwendig!):

**📍 OPTION 1: **IFA Rügen Hotel & Ferienpark
* **Gesucht:** Familien (optimal 2 Erwachsene und maximal 2 Kinder)
* **Alter:** Eltern zwischen 25 und 45 Jahren, Kinder bis maximal 12 Jahre

**📍 OPTION 2: **IFA Graal-Müritz Hotel, Spa & Tagungen
* **Gesucht:** Ein Paar
* **Alter:** Zwischen 25 und 50 Jahren

🗓️ **Wann?** Ab Ende Juni oder auch in den kommenden Monaten (genaue Termine und Tage stimmen wir individuell ab).

💡 **Ablauf & Setting:** Es gibt einen festen, vorgegebenen Drehplan. Ihr werdet von unserem Produktionsteam professionell und entspannt angeleitet und setzt gemeinsam mit uns schöne Urlaubsszenen im Hotel um (z. B. beim Frühstück, im Wellnessbereich oder am Strand).

Da das Projekt im Rahmen einer Kooperation ohne Geldfluss realisiert wird, bieten wir euch einen tollen Mehrwert:
* **Übernachtung & Verpflegung:** Wir laden euch für den Zeitraum des Drehs zu uns ins jeweilige Hotel ein – für eure Unterkunft sowie die komplette Verpflegung ist selbstverständlich gesorgt!
* **High-End-Material:** Nach dem Dreh stellen wir euch das professionell produzierte und bearbeitete Bild- und Videomaterial (Studio-Qualität) sehr gerne kostenfrei zur Verfügung – eine tolle Erinnerung oder perfekt für die eigene Sedcard / das Portfolio.
* **Erfahrung:** Ein spannender Blick hinter die Kulissen eines professionellen Drehteams.

**Interesse?** Wenn ihr Zeit und Lust auf einen Kurztrip inkl. Shooting an der Ostsee habt, schreibt uns gerne eine Nachricht mit:
1. Für welches Hotel (Rügen oder Graal-Müritz) ihr euch bewerbt
2. Aktuellen Fotos von euch (bzw. eurer Familie) und/oder Proben aus vorherigen Projekten
3. Eurem Alter (bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)(bei Familien auch das Alter der Kinder)
4. Eurer Verfügbarkeit Ende Juni 

Wir freuen uns auf eure Nachrichten! 📩

Statisten aller Altersgruppen für inszenierte Party  gesucht /Berlin,
Für ein studentisches Film Projektsuche ich Models und Statisten aller Altersgruppen für eine inszenierte Party karaoke Nacht .

In Berlin am 29.05.2026  zwischen 15-18 h 

Das Projekt ist leider unbezahlt. Als Dankeschön biete ich euch jedoch ein professionelles Fotoshooting oder auf Wunsch auch ein kleines Video- bzw. Content-Shooting für eure eigenen Bedürfnisse an – egal ob Portraits, Paarfotos, Bewerbungsbilder, Social Media oder etwas anderes.

Das Shooting findet am 29.05  zwischen 15.00 und 18.00 statt und dauert ungefähr einen halben Tag. 

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht mit ein paar Infos zu euch.

✨ EXTRA ROUND NOW OPEN ✨

We had so many amazing talents signing up for Selfcast Exclusive Denmark that we are opening one extra team before the summer holidays.

Selfcast Exclusive Talent Program is created for talents who want stronger material, a more professional profile, and a better way to present themselves for future castings.

As part of the program, you will get:

📸 Professional photoshoot with makeup artist
🎬 Presentation videos
💛 Selfcast workshop
👕 Selfcast T-shirt
✨ Stronger profile material for your Selfcast profile

This is more than a photoshoot. It is a full talent profile upgrade designed to help you stand stronger for future castings.

Dates:
Workshop: Sunday 14 June
Photoshoot: Monday 15 June or Tuesday 16 June

Limited spots available.

Deadline to apply: Thursday 4 June

Apply now in the Selfcast app.

#selfcast #selfcastexclusive #castingmadeeasy #selfcastallover

items.text:
**DEVACURL BEAUTY CURLY HAIR STYLING TUTORIAL SHOOT**
**Culver City, California**

### CASTING CALL

**AUDITION DATE**
Monday, June 8, 2026
1:00 PM – 3:00 PM

**PAY RATE**
$560 Flat Rate

**SEEKING**

Female-identifying talent, ages 18–40s, including:

* Women
* Non-binary talent
* Androgynous talent
* Transgender talent

All ethnicities, heights, and sizes are encouraged to apply.

### HAIR REQUIREMENTS

* Natural shoulder-length hair or longer
* Curl pattern: **3A, 3B, or 3C**
* Natural hair colors only

**Not Accepted:**

* Extensions
* Wigs
* Hair pieces
* Obvious root regrowth
* Fashion colors (pink, blue, purple, green, etc.)
* Models under 18 years old

### PROJECT DETAILS

This is a **DevaCurl Beauty Styling Tutorial Shoot** featuring curly hair styling techniques and transformations.

The amount of styling performed will be determined collaboratively between the model and the artist.

**No haircut or color services will be performed.**

### AUDITION INFORMATION

**Date:** Monday, June 8, 2026
**Time:** 1:00 PM – 3:00 PM
*(Models may arrive anytime during audition hours.)*

### COMPENSATION

**$560 Flat Rate**

**DM for additional details and submission instructions.**

items.text:
Most actors will read this and do nothing. That is fine. This is not for them.
I am Freya Tingley. Two Netflix series regular roles. Six feature film leads. Jersey Boys with Clint Eastwood.
Once Upon a Time on ABC.

Started at 14. No connections. No money. No Hollywood family. Signed with a top Hollywood agent by 17. Booked a Netflix series regular at 18, three months after moving to LA.

That is not luck. That is a strategy I can prove works, because I have run it on myself and watched it work on the
actors I have quietly coached for years.
Here is what most actors are doing.

Training, thousands of dollars.
New headshots, hundreds.
Self-tapes, no bookings.
Waiting for agents to call.

Years burned. Bank accounts drained. Confidence destroyed.

Here is what working actors are actually doing.

Optimising for the one specific skill that determines booking rate.
Engineering the conditions for representation to chase them.
Generating their own opportunities when reps go quiet.
Treating their career like a business, not a lottery ticket.

That is the difference. And nobody teaches it.

So I am running 2-hour private 1:1 mentorships over Zoom. Just you and me. Fully tailored to your career stage.

What you get:
• A diagnosis of why you are stuck, specific not generic
• The booking skill audit, will rewire how you audition
• A representation strategy if you do not have an agent
• A re-activation strategy if your agent has gone cold• A self-generated opportunity plan you can run this month
• My exact materials checklist

Outcome: you leave with a written plan. No confusion. No "what now". Just execution.

If you know you are ready, DM me "COMMIT" to apply.

I take a handful of these a month. That is it.

sharedPost.text:
🚨Hey friends! This just in..🎬🎬

Something is calling this weekend.

My new short film, The Last Call, premieres this weekend on YouTube! 

This 12-minute psychological thriller follows Rachael, a woman haunted by a series of unsettling phone calls. The voices on the other end aren't strangers they know her. They know her fears. They know her secrets. And with every ring, they draw her deeper into a nightmare she can't escape.

As reality begins to unravel and the voices grow louder, Rachael finds herself standing at the edge of a terrifying truth.

The Last Call drops this weekend.

For updates, behind-the-scenes content, and future releases, follow us on Facebook at CorneredX and subscribe to the TYVISION Collective YouTube channel. #follower

#TheLastCall #PsychologicalThriller #ShortFilm #IndieFilm #CorneredX #TYVISIONCollective #ComingThisWeekend #tyvisioncollective
